rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Scary Fangs
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, if this Pokémon is damaged by an attack (even if it is Knocked Out), put 10 damage counters on the Attacking Pokémon.

name: Skeledirge ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Vitality Song
attacks.text: Heal 30 damage from each of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Burning Voice
attacks.text: This attack does 10 less damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.

name: Chi-Yu ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Jealously Singe
attacks.text: Discard the top 2 cards of your opponent's deck.

attacks.name: Flame Surge
attacks.text: Choose up to 3 of your Benched Pokémon. For each of those Pokémon, search your deck for a Basic Fire Energy card and attach it to that Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.

name: Tinkaton ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Big Hammer
attacks.text: This attack does 30 damage for each card in your hand.

attacks.name: Pulverizing Press
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

name: Grusha
rules: Draw cards until you have 5 cards in your hand. If none of your Pokémon have any Energy attached, draw cards until you have 7 cards in your hand instead.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

name: Iono
rules: Each player shuffles their hand and puts it on the bottom of their deck. If either player put any cards on the bottom of their deck in this way, each player draws a card for each of their remaining Prize cards.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

name: Giacomo
rules: Discard a Special Energy from each of your opponent's Pokémon.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

name: Saguaro
rules: Choose up to 2 of your Pokémon and heal 50 damage from each of them.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

name: Quaquaval ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Exciting Dance
attacks.text: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon. If you do, switch out your opponent's Active Pokémon to the Bench. (Your opponent chooses the new Active Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Spiral Shot
attacks.text: Put 2 Energy attached to this Pokémon into your hand.

name: Skeledirge ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Vitality Song
attacks.text: Heal 30 damage from each of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Burning Voice
attacks.text: This attack does 10 less damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.

name: Meowscarada ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Bouquet Magic
abilities.text: You must discard a Basic Grass Energy card from your hand in order to use this Ability. Once during your turn, you may put 3 damage counters on 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Scratching Nails
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon already has any damage counters on it, this attack does 120 more damage.

name: Ting-Lu ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Cursed Land
abilities.text: As long as this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, your opponent's Pokémon in play that have any damage counters on them have no Abilities, except for Pokémon ex.

attacks.name: Land Scoop
attacks.text: Put 2 damage counters on 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

name: Super Rod
rules: Shuffle up to 3 in any combination of Pokémon and Basic Energy cards from your discard pile into your deck.
You may play any number of Item cards during your turn.

name: Chien-Pao ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Shivery Chill
abilities.text: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you may search your deck for up to 2 Basic Water Energy cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Hail Blade
attacks.text: You may discard any amount of Water Energy from your Pokémon. This attack does 60 damage for each card you discarded in this way.

name: Superior Energy Retrieval
rules: You can use this card only if you discard 2 other cards from your hand.Put up to 4 Basic Energy cards from your discard pile into your hand. (You can't choose a card you discarded with the effect of this card.)
You may play any number of Item cards during your turn.

name: Flaaffy

attacks.name: Extreme Current
attacks.text: Discard an Energy from this Pokémon.

flavorText: As a result of storing too much electricity, it developed patches where even downy wool won't grow.

name: Lucario ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Aura Sphere
attacks.text: This attack also does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Ampharos ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Thunderstrike Tail
attacks.text: You may discard 2 Energy from this Pokémon to have this attack do 100 more damage.

name: Cyclizar ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Power Run
attacks.text: Search your deck for a Basic Energy card and attach it to this Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Full Throttle
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

name: Special Delivery Charizard

attacks.name: Happy Delivery
attacks.text: Search your deck for up to 2 Item cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Flamethrower
attacks.text: Discard an Energy from this Pokémon.

flavorText: It spits fire that is hot enough to melt boulders. It may cause forest fires by blowing flames.

name: Galarian Articuno

abilities.name: Cruel Charge
abilities.text: When you play this Pokémon from your hand onto your Bench during your turn, you may attach up to 2 Psychic Energy cards from your hand to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Psylaser
attacks.text: Discard all Psychic Energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 120 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: Known as Articuno, this Pokémon fires beams that can immobilize opponents as if they had been frozen solid.

name: Klara
rules: Choose 1 or both: • Put up to 2 Pokémon from your discard pile into your hand. • Put up to 2 basic Energy cards from your discard pile into your hand.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

name: Greninja

attacks.name: Coordinated Shuriken
attacks.text: This attack also does 10 damage to 3 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: It creates throwing stars out of compressed water. When it spins them and throws them at high speed, these stars can split metal in two.

name: Morpeko V-UNION
rules: How to play a Pokémon V-UNION: Once per game during your turn, combine 4 different Morpeko V-UNION from your discard pile and put them onto your Bench.
V-UNION rule: When your Pokémon V-UNION is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Union Gain
attacks.text: Attach up to 2 Lightning Energy cards from your discard pile to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: All You Can Eat
attacks.text: Draw cards until you have 10 cards in your hand.

attacks.name: Burst Wheel
attacks.text: Discard all energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 100 damage for each card you discarded in this way.

name: Arceus V
rules: V rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Trinity Charge
attacks.text: Search your deck for up to 3 basic Energy cards and attach them to your Pokémon V in any way you like. Then, shuffle your deck.

name: Morpeko V-UNION
rules: How to play a Pokémon V-UNION: Once per game during your turn, combine 4 different Morpeko V-UNION from your discard pile and put them onto your Bench.
V-UNION rule: When your Pokémon V-UNION is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Union Gain
attacks.text: Attach up to 2 Lightning Energy cards from your discard pile to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: All You Can Eat
attacks.text: Draw cards until you have 10 cards in your hand.

attacks.name: Burst Wheel
attacks.text: Discard all energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 100 damage for each card you discarded in this way.

name: Zacian V
rules: V rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Intrepid Sword
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may look at the top 3 cards of your deck and attach any number of Metal Energy cards you find there to this Pokémon. Put the other cards into your hand. If you use this Ability, your turn ends.

attacks.name: Brave Blade
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

name: Zamazenta V
rules: V rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Dauntless Shield
abilities.text: Prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from your opponent's Pokémon VMAX.

attacks.name: Assault Tackle
attacks.text: Discard a Special Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

name: Arceus VSTAR
rules: VSTAR rule: When your Pokémon VSTAR is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Starbirth
abilities.text: During your turn, you may search your deck for up to 2 cards and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck. (You can't use more than 1 VSTAR Power in a game.)

attacks.name: Trinity Nova
attacks.text: Search your deck for up to 3 basic Energy cards and attach them to your Pokémon V in any way you like. Then, shuffle your deck.

name: Boss's Orders
rules: Switch 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon with their Active Pokémon.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

name: Galarian Zapdos

abilities.name: Strong Legs Charge
abilities.text: When you play this Pokémon from your hand onto your Bench during your turn, you may attach up to 2 Fighting Energy cards from your hand to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Zapper Kick
attacks.text: You may discard all Energy from this Pokémon. If you do, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: One kick from its powerful legs will pulverize a dump truck. Supposedly, this Pokémon runs through the mountains at over 180 mph.

name: Galarian Moltres

abilities.name: Malevolent Charge
abilities.text: When you play this Pokémon from your hand onto your Bench during your turn, you may attach up to 2 Darkness Energy cards from your hand to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Fiery Wrath
attacks.text: This attack does 50 more damage for each Prize card your opponent has taken.

flavorText: The sinister aura that blazes like molten fire around this Pokémon is what inspired the name Moltres.

name: Morpeko V-UNION
rules: How to play a Pokémon V-UNION: Once per game during your turn, combine 4 different Morpeko V-UNION from your discard pile and put them onto your Bench.
V-UNION rule: When your Pokémon V-UNION is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Union Gain
attacks.text: Attach up to 2 Lightning Energy cards from your discard pile to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: All You Can Eat
attacks.text: Draw cards until you have 10 cards in your hand.

attacks.name: Burst Wheel
attacks.text: Discard all energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 100 damage for each card you discarded in this way.

name: Morpeko V-UNION
rules: How to play a Pokémon V-UNION: Once per game during your turn, combine 4 different Morpeko V-UNION from your discard pile and put them onto your Bench.
V-UNION rule: When your Pokémon V-UNION is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Union Gain
attacks.text: Attach up to 2 Lightning Energy cards from your discard pile to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: All You Can Eat
attacks.text: Draw cards until you have 10 cards in your hand.

attacks.name: Burst Wheel
attacks.text: Discard all energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 100 damage for each card you discarded in this way.

name: Bulbasaur

attacks.name: Shake and Gather
attacks.text: Flip a coin until you get tails. For each heads, draw a card.

flavorText: There is a plant seed on its back right from the day this Pokémon is born. The seed slowly grows larger.

name: Arcanine

attacks.name: Sun-Drenched Tackle
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

flavorText: The sight of it running over 6,200 miles in a single day and night has captivated many people.

name: Pelipper

abilities.name: Hearsay
abilities.text: When you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon during your turn, you may choose 1: put a Supporter card from your discard pile into your hand; or search your deck for a Supporter card, reveal it, put it into your hand, and then shuffle your deck.

flavorText: It is a flying transporter that carries small Pokémon in its beak. It bobs on the waves to rest its wings.

name: Baxcalibur

abilities.name: Super Cold
abilities.text: As often as you like during your turn, you may attach a Basic Water Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Pokémon.

flavorText: This Pokémon blasts cryogenic air out from its mouth. This air can instantly freeze even liquid-hot lava.

name: Tinkaton

abilities.name: Gather Materials
abilities.text: You must discard a card from your hand in order to use this Ability. Once during your turn, you may draw 3 cards.

attacks.name: Special Hammer
attacks.text: If this Pokémon has any Special Energy attached, this attack does 90 more damage.

flavorText: This intelligent Pokémon has a very daring disposition. It knocks rocks into the sky with its hammer, aiming for flying Corviknight.

name: Murkrow

attacks.name: Spin Turn
attacks.text: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: United Wings
attacks.text: This attack does 20 damage for each Pokémon in your discard pile that has the United Wings attack.

flavorText: Feared and loathed by many, it is believed to bring misfortune to all those who see it at night.

name: Smoliv

attacks.name: Nutrients
attacks.text: Heal 30 damage from 1 of your Pokémon.

flavorText: It protects itself from enemies by emitting oil from the fruit on its head. This oil is bitter and astringent enough to make someone flinch.

name: Tinkatink

attacks.name: Smithereen Smash
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: It swings its handmade hammer around to protect itself, but the hammer is often stolen by Pokémon that eat metal.

name: Pikachu

attacks.name: Adventuring Together
attacks.text: This attack does 10 more damage for each of your Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: Pikachu seems excited to be going on an adventure, and so do its new pals, from attention-seeking Sprigatito to laid-back Fuecoco and tidy Quaxly.

name: Koraidon ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Dino Cry
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may attach up to 2 Basic Fighting Energy cards from your discard pile to your Basic Fighting Pokémon in any way you like. If you use this Ability, your turn ends.

attacks.name: Wild Impact
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

name: Growlithe

attacks.name: Stoke
attacks.text: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Fire Energy cards and attach them to this Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: It's very friendly and faithful to people. It will try to repel enemies by barking and biting.

name: Varoom

attacks.name: Poison Gas
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavorText: It is said that this Pokémon was born when an unknown poison Pokémon entered and inspirited an engine left at a scrap-processing factory.

name: Miraidon ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Tandem Unit
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may search your deck for up to 2 Basic Lightning Pokémon and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Photon Blaster
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

name: Surskit

attacks.name: Lunge
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: They usually live on ponds, but after an evening shower, they may appear on puddles in towns.

name: Gloom

attacks.name: Inviting Scent
attacks.text: Switch in 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon to the Active Spot.

flavorText: What appears to be drool is actually sweet honey. It is very sticky and clings stubbornly if touched.

name: Oddish

attacks.name: Feelin' Fine
attacks.text: Draw a card.

flavorText: During the day, it stays in the cold underground to avoid the sun. It grows by bathing in moonlight.

name: Phantump
flavorText: With a voice like a human child's, it cries out to lure adults deep into the forest, getting them lost among the trees.

name: Steenee

attacks.name: Aromatherapy
attacks.text: Heal 30 damage from each of your Pokémon.

flavorText: Steenee spreads a sweet scent that makes others feel invigorated. This same scent is popular for antiperspirants.

name: Charmeleon

attacks.name: Heat Tackle
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 20 damage to itself.

flavorText: If it becomes agitated during battle, it spouts intense flames, incinerating its surroundings.

name: Camerupt

attacks.name: Eruption
attacks.text: Discard the top card of each player's deck. This attack does 100 more damage for each Energy card discarded in this way.

flavorText: It lives in the crater of a volcano. It is well known that the humps on its back erupt every 10 years.

name: Victini ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Strafe
attacks.text: You may switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Victory Flame
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

name: Darmanitan

attacks.name: Damage Counterpunch
attacks.text: If this Pokémon has any damage counters on it, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavorText: This Pokémon's power level rises along with the temperature of its fire, which can reach 2,500 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Scyther

attacks.name: Agility
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from and effects of attacks done to this Pokémon.

flavorText: It slashes through grass with its sharp scythes, moving too fast for the human eye to track.

name: Foongus

attacks.name: Enticing Pattern
attacks.text: Search your deck for a Basic Grass Pokémon and put it onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: There is a theory that the developer of the modern-day Poké Ball really liked Foongus, but this has not been confirmed.

name: Capsakid

attacks.name: Double Headbutt
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 50 damage for each heads.

flavorText: The more sunlight this Pokémon bathes in, the more spicy chemicals are produced by its body, and thus the spicier its moves become.

name: Scovillain

abilities.name: Double Type
abilities.text: As long as this Pokémon is in play, it is Grass and Fire type.

attacks.name: Spicy Headbutt
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.

flavorText: The red head converts spicy chemicals into fire energy and blasts the surrounding area with a super spicy stream of flame.

name: Numel

attacks.name: Hot Magma
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

flavorText: Magma of almost 2,200 degrees Fahrenheit courses through its body. When it grows cold, the magma hardens and slows it.

name: Darumaka

attacks.name: Surprise Attack
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: This popular symbol of good fortune will never fall over in its sleep, no matter how it's pushed or pulled.

name: Combee

attacks.name: Share
attacks.text: Heal 20 damage from 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: At night, Combee sleep in a group of about a hundred, packed closely together in a lump.

name: Bellossom

attacks.name: Sleep Powder
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Powerful Dance
attacks.text: Flip a coin for each Energy attached to this Pokémon. This attack does 90 damage for each heads.

flavorText: Bellossom gather at times and appear to dance. They say that the dance is a ritual to summon the sun.

name: Shuckle

attacks.name: Berry Scent
attacks.text: Search your deck for a Basic Pokémon and put it onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Guard Press
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 30 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

flavorText: The berries stored in its vaselike shell eventually become a thick, pulpy juice.

name: Masquerain

attacks.name: Panic-Prompting Pattern
attacks.text: Flip a coin until you get tails. For each heads, discard a random card from your opponent's hand.

flavorText: It flaps its four wings to hover and fly freely in any direction—to and fro and sideways.

name: Amoonguss

attacks.name: Dangerous Spores
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed and Poisoned.

flavorText: Be wary of the poisonous spores it releases. Mushrooms resembling Amoonguss's caps will grow out of anywhere the spores touch.

name: Trevenant

abilities.name: Forest Miasma
abilities.text: During Pokémon Checkup, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, put 1 damage counter on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Lock Up
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

flavorText: Small roots that extend from the tips of this Pokémon's feet can tie into the trees of the forest and give Trevenant control over them.

name: Decidueye ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Total Freedom
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may use this Ability. If this Pokémon is on the Bench, switch it with your Active Pokémon. Or, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, switch it with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Hunting Arrow
attacks.text: This attack also does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Bounsweet

attacks.name: Reckless Charge
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: Its sweat is sweet, like syrup made from boiled-down fruit. Because of this, Bounsweet was highly valued in the past, when sweeteners were scarce.

name: Tsareena

attacks.name: Queenly Heel
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, Pokémon can't be played from your opponent's hand to evolve the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Spinning Kick
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 20 damage to itself.

flavorText: This Pokémon is proud and aggressive. However, it is said that a Tsareena will instantly become calm if someone touches the crown on its calyx.

name: Smoliv

attacks.name: Absorb
attacks.text: Heal 10 damage from this Pokémon.

flavorText: It protects itself from enemies by emitting oil from the fruit on its head. This oil is bitter and astringent enough to make someone flinch.

name: Dolliv

attacks.name: Sunny Wind
attacks.text: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

flavorText: Dolliv shares its tasty, fresh-scented oil with others. This species has coexisted with humans since times long gone.

name: Toedscruel ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Protective Mycelium
abilities.text: Prevent all effects of attacks used by your opponent's Pokémon done to all of your Pokémon that have Energy attached. (Existing effects are not removed. Damage is not an effect.)

attacks.name: Colony Rush
attacks.text: This attack does 40 more damage for each of your Benched Pokémon that has any Grass Energy attached.

name: Vulpix

attacks.name: Confuse Ray
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: As each tail grows, its fur becomes more lustrous. When held, it feels slightly warm.

name: Rowlet
flavorText: It feels relaxed in tight, dark places and has been known to use its Trainer's pocket or bag as a nest.

name: Dartrix

attacks.name: Shoot Through
attacks.text: This attack also does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: Supremely sensitive to the presence of others, it can detect opponents standing behind it, flinging its sharp feathers to take them out.

name: Arboliva

attacks.name: Healing Fruit
attacks.text: Heal all damage from 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: This calm Pokémon is very compassionate. It will share its delicious, nutrient-rich oil with weakened Pokémon.

name: Capsakid

attacks.name: Reckless Charge
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: The more sunlight this Pokémon bathes in, the more spicy chemicals are produced by its body, and thus the spicier its moves become.

name: Charmander

attacks.name: Heat Tackle
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: From the time it is born, a flame burns at the tip of its tail. Its life would end if the flame were to go out.

name: Ninetales

attacks.name: Nine-Tailed Dance
attacks.text: Put 9 damage counters on 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

flavorText: Very smart and very vengeful. Grabbing one of its many tails could result in a 1,000-year curse.

name: Entei

abilities.name: Pressure
abilities.text: As long as this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, attacks used by your opponent's Active Pokémon do 20 less damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Blaze Ball
attacks.text: This attack does 20 more damage for each Fire Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: It is said that when it roars, a volcano erupts somewhere around the globe.

name: Litwick

attacks.name: Firebreathing
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 more damage.

flavorText: The younger the life this Pokémon absorbs, the brighter and eerier the flame on its head burns.

name: Eiscue ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.
Tera: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks (both yours and your opponent's).

attacks.name: Scalding Block
attacks.text: Discard an Energy from this Pokémon. During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't attack.

name: Lapras

attacks.name: Hail
attacks.text: This attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: Crossing icy seas is no issue for this cold-resistant Pokémon. Its smooth skin is a little cool to the touch.

name: Buizel

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 more damage.

flavorText: It spins its two tails like a screw to propel itself through water. The tails also slice clinging seaweed.

name: Beartic

attacks.name: Frost Purge
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, discard all Energy from this Pokémon.

flavorText: It is a ferocious, carnivorous Pokémon. Once it captures its prey, it will breathe cold air onto the prey to freeze and preserve it.

name: Wiglett
flavorText: This Pokémon can pick up the scent of a Veluza just over 65 feet away and will hide itself in the sand.

name: Finizen

attacks.name: Valiant Evolution
attacks.text: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon. If you do, search your deck for a card that evolves from this Pokémon and put it onto this Pokémon to evolve it. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: It likes playing with others of its kind using the water ring on its tail. It uses ultrasonic waves to sense the emotions of other living creatures.

name: Palafin

attacks.name: Jet Punch
attacks.text: This attack also does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Justice Kick
attacks.text: If this Pokémon didn't move from the Bench to the Active Spot this turn, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: This Pokémon's ancient genes have awakened. It is now so extraordinarily strong that it can easily lift a cruise ship with one fin.

name: Magneton
flavorText: Three Magnemite are linked by a strong magnetic force. Earaches will occur if you get too close.

name: Magnezone

attacks.name: Magnetic Repulsion
attacks.text: You may switch out your opponent's Active Pokémon to the Bench. (Your opponent chooses the new Active Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Thunder
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

flavorText: As it zooms through the sky, this Pokémon seems to be receiving signals of unknown origin while transmitting signals of unknown purpose.

name: Thundurus

abilities.name: Adverse Weather
abilities.text: As long as this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, prevent all damage done to your Benched Pokémon by attacks from your opponent's Pokémon.

attacks.name: Gigantic Bolt
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 90 damage to itself.

flavorText: As it flies around, it shoots lightning all over the place and causes forest fires. It is therefore disliked.

name: Toxel

attacks.name: Slight Intrusion
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: It has no problem drinking dirty water. An organ inside Toxel's body filters such water into a poisonous liquid that is harmless to Toxel.

name: Tadbulb

attacks.name: Energize
attacks.text: Attach a Basic Lightning Energy card from your discard pile to this Pokémon.

flavorText: Tadbulb shakes its tail to generate electricity. If it senses danger, it will make its head blink on and off to alert its allies.

name: Clefable ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Lunar Zone
abilities.text: All of your Pokémon that have Psychic Energy attached have no Retreat Cost.

attacks.name: Wondrous Moon
attacks.text: You may move any amount of Psychic Energy from your Pokémon to your other Pokémon in any way you like.

name: Espeon

attacks.name: Psychic Assault
attacks.text: This attack does 10 more damage for each damage counter on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Psy Bolt
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: The tip of its forked tail quivers when it is predicting its opponent's next move.

name: Granbull

attacks.name: Wild Tackle
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

flavorText: Although it's popular with young people, Granbull is timid and sensitive, so it's totally incompetent as a watchdog.

name: Baltoy

attacks.name: Rapid Spin
attacks.text: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon. If you do, switch out your opponent's Active Pokémon to the Bench. (Your opponent chooses the new Active Pokémon.)

flavorText: It was discovered in ancient ruins. While moving, it constantly spins. It stands on one foot even when asleep.

name: Claydol

attacks.name: Kaboom Doll
attacks.text: Put damage counters on your opponent's Active Pokémon until its remaining HP is 10. If you placed any damage counters in this way, this attack also does 120 damage to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Mind Bend
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: It appears to have been born from clay dolls made by ancient people. It uses telekinesis to float and move.

name: Vespiquen ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.
Tera: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks (both yours and your opponent's).

attacks.name: Healing Pheromone
attacks.text: Heal 60 damage from 1 of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Phantom Queen
attacks.text: Put 3 damage counters on each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon that has any damage counters on it.

name: Sinistea

attacks.name: Cold Tea
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: The soul of someone who died alone possessed some leftover tea. This Pokémon appears in hotels and houses.

name: Diglett

attacks.name: Hole-Diggin' Noggin
attacks.text: Discard the top card of your deck.

flavorText: It lives about one yard underground, where it feeds on plant roots. It sometimes appears aboveground.

name: Barboach

attacks.name: Hide
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from and effects of attacks done to this Pokémon.

flavorText: Its two whiskers provide a sensitive radar. Even in muddy waters, it can detect its prey's location.

name: Whiscash

attacks.name: Raging and Rocking
attacks.text: For each Fighting Energy attached to this Pokémon, discard the top card of your opponent's deck.

flavorText: It is extremely protective of its territory. If any foe approaches, it attacks using vicious tremors.

name: Crabrawler
flavorText: This Pokémon punches trees and eats the berries that drop down, training itself and getting food at the same time.

name: Crabominable

attacks.name: Knuckle Impact
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

flavorText: The detached pincers of these Pokémon are delicious. Some Trainers bring Lechonk into the mountains just to search for them.

name: Rockruff
flavorText: This Pokémon is very friendly when it's young. Its disposition becomes vicious once it matures, but it never forgets the kindness of its master.

name: Lycanroc

attacks.name: Finishing Fang
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon has no damage counters on it before this attack does damage, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: This Pokémon uses its rocky mane to slash any who approach. It will even disobey its Trainer if it dislikes the orders it was given.

name: Glimmet

attacks.name: Iron Defense
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks.

flavorText: It absorbs nutrients from cave walls. The petals it wears are made of crystallized poison.

name: Paldean Wooper
flavorText: After losing a territorial struggle, Wooper began living on land. The Pokémon changed over time, developing a poisonous film to protect its body.

name: Paldean Clodsire

attacks.name: Splattering Poison
attacks.text: Both Active Pokémon are now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Venoshock
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is Poisoned, this attack does 120 more damage.

flavorText: When attacked, this Pokémon will retaliate by sticking thick spines out from its body. It's a risky move that puts everything on the line.

name: Heatmor

attacks.name: Energy Burner
attacks.text: This attack does 30 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: A flame serves as its tongue, melting through the hard shell of Durant so that Heatmor can devour their insides.

name: Floatzel

attacks.name: Swirling Tail
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, put your opponent's Active Pokémon and all attached cards into your opponent's hand.

flavorText: With its flotation sac inflated, it can carry people on its back. It deflates the sac before it dives.

name: Tympole

attacks.name: Screw Tail
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: It uses sound waves to communicate with others of its kind. People and other Pokémon species can't hear its cries of warning.

name: Cubchoo

attacks.name: Trip Over
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavorText: Many of this species can be found along the shorelines of cold regions. If a Cubchoo lacks dangling snot, there's a chance it is sick.

name: Cryogonal

attacks.name: First Freeze
attacks.text: If you go second and it's your first turn, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: Cryogonal appear during cold seasons. It is said that people and Pokémon who die on snowy mountains are reborn into these Pokémon.

name: Magnemite
flavorText: The electromagnetic waves emitted by the units at the sides of its head expel antigravity, which allows it to float.

name: Tyranitar ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.
Tera: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks (both yours and your opponent's).

attacks.name: Mountain Hurl
attacks.text: Discard the top 2 cards of your deck.

attacks.name: Lightning Rampage
attacks.text: If your Benched Pokémon have any damage counters on them, this attack does 100 more damage.

name: Tynamo
flavorText: While one alone doesn't have much power, a chain of many Tynamo can be as powerful as lightning.

name: Eelektrik

attacks.name: Volt Wave
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: They coil around foes and shock them with electricity-generating organs that seem simply to be circular patterns.

name: Eelektross

attacks.name: Suction Shock
attacks.text: Switch in 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon to the Active Spot. If you do, this attack does 60 damage to the new Active Pokémon, and then flip a coin. If heads, that Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: They crawl out of the ocean using their arms. They will attack prey on shore and immediately drag it into the ocean.

name: Tadbulb

attacks.name: Shake and Discharge
attacks.text: This attack also does 10 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: Tadbulb shakes its tail to generate electricity. If it senses danger, it will make its head blink on and off to alert its allies.

name: Cleffa

attacks.name: Grasping Draw
attacks.text: Draw cards until you have 7 cards in your hand.

flavorText: Because of its unusual, starlike silhouette, people believe that it came here on a meteor.

name: Clefairy

attacks.name: Slap Slap
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 damage for each heads.

flavorText: Its adorable behavior and cry make it highly popular. However, this cute Pokémon is rarely found.

name: Togepi

attacks.name: Whiny Voice
attacks.text: Choose a random card from your opponent's hand. Your opponent reveals that card and shuffles it into their deck.

flavorText: It is considered to be a symbol of good luck. Its shell is said to be filled with happiness.

name: Togekiss

abilities.name: Precious Gift
abilities.text: Once at the end of your turn (after your attack), you may use this Ability. Draw cards until you have 8 cards in your hand.

attacks.name: Power Cyclone
attacks.text: Move an Energy from this Pokémon to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: Known as a bringer of blessings, it's been depicted on good-luck charms since ancient times.

name: Snubbull

attacks.name: Double-Edge
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: In contrast to its appearance, it's quite timid. When playing with other puppy Pokémon, it sometimes gets bullied.

name: Lunatone

abilities.name: New Moon
abilities.text: If you have Solrock in play, prevent all effects of any Stadium done to your Pokémon in play.

flavorText: It was discovered at the site of a meteor strike 40 years ago. Its stare can lull its foes to sleep.

name: Greavard

attacks.name: Play Rough
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavorText: It is said that a dog Pokémon that died in the wild without ever interacting with a human was reborn as this Pokémon.

name: Larvitar
flavorText: Born deep underground, this Pokémon becomes a pupa after eating enough dirt to make a mountain.

name: Pupitar

attacks.name: Blasting Tackle
attacks.text: This attack also does 20 damage to 1 of your Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: This pupa flies around wildly by venting with great force the gas pressurized inside its body.

name: Toedscruel

attacks.name: Double Whip
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 100 damage for each heads.

flavorText: These Pokémon gather into groups and form colonies deep within forests. They absolutely hate it when strangers approach.

name: Koraidon ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Splitting Beam
attacks.text: This attack also does 20 damage to 2 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Gaia Press
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

name: Lampent

attacks.name: Alluring Fireball
attacks.text: Switch in 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon to the Active Spot. This attack does 30 damage to the new Active Pokémon.

flavorText: It lurks in cities, pretending to be a lamp. Once it finds someone whose death is near, it will trail quietly after them.

name: Volcarona

attacks.name: Flame Cloak
attacks.text: Attach a Basic Fire Energy card from your discard pile to this Pokémon.

flavorText: Its burning body causes it to be unpopular in hot parts of the world, but in cold ones, Volcarona is revered as an embodiment of the sun.

name: Armarouge

abilities.name: Scorching Armor
abilities.text: If this Pokémon is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokémon (even if this Pokémon is Knocked Out), the Attacking Pokémon is now Burned.

flavorText: Armarouge evolved through the use of a set of armor that belonged to a distinguished warrior. This Pokémon is incredibly loyal.

name: Sharpedo

attacks.name: Aqua Impact
attacks.text: This attack does 30 more damage for each Colorless in your opponent's Active Pokémon's Retreat Cost.

flavorText: This Pokémon is known as the Bully of the Sea. Any ship entering the waters Sharpedo calls home will be attacked—no exceptions.

name: Seismitoad

abilities.name: Quaking Zone
abilities.text: As long as this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, attacks used by your opponent's Active Pokémon cost Colorless more.

attacks.name: Echoed Voice
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon's Echoed Voice attack does 100 more damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

flavorText: This Pokémon is popular among the elderly, who say the vibrations of its lumps are great for massages.

name: Toxtricity

attacks.name: Leer
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Loud Mix
attacks.text: This attack does 30 more damage for each different type of Pokémon on your Bench.

flavorText: Many youths admire the way this Pokémon listlessly picks fights and keeps its cool no matter what opponent it faces.

name: Bellibolt

attacks.name: Electrobullet
attacks.text: This attack also does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: When this Pokémon expands and contracts its wobbly body, the belly-button dynamo in its stomach produces a huge amount of electricity.

name: Mawile

attacks.name: Mischievous Crunch
attacks.text: This attack does 30 damage for each Psychic Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: It chomps with its gaping mouth. Its huge jaws are actually steel horns that have been transformed.

name: Spoink
flavorText: Spoink will die if it stops bouncing. The pearl on its head amplifies its psychic powers.

name: Greavard
flavorText: It is said that a dog Pokémon that died in the wild without ever interacting with a human was reborn as this Pokémon.

name: Nosepass

attacks.name: Iron Collecting
attacks.text: Put up to 2 Basic Metal Energy cards from your discard pile into your hand.

flavorText: It hunts without twitching a muscle by pulling in its prey with powerful magnetism. But sometimes it pulls natural enemies in close.

name: Bonsly

attacks.name: Blubbering
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: In order to adjust the level of fluids in its body, it exudes water from its eyes. This makes it appear to be crying.

name: Drilbur

attacks.name: Rising Lunge
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 more damage.

flavorText: It's a digger, using its claws to burrow through the ground. It causes damage to vegetable crops, so many farmers have little love for it.

name: Stunfisk

abilities.name: Custom Trap
abilities.text: If this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, has a Pokémon Tool attached, and is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokémon (even if this Pokémon is Knocked Out), put 5 damage counters on the Attacking Pokémon.

attacks.name: Rumble
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

flavorText: For some reason, this Pokémon smiles slightly when it emits a strong electric current from the yellow markings on its body.

name: Klawf ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Counterattacking Pincer
abilities.text: If this Pokémon is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokémon (even if this Pokémon is Knocked Out), discard an Energy from the Attacking Pokémon.

attacks.name: Falling Press
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 80 more damage.

name: Paldean Clodsire

attacks.name: Poison Ring
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned. During your opponent's next turn, that Pokémon can't retreat.

attacks.name: Muddy Hammer
attacks.text: Discard the top card of your opponent's deck.

flavorText: When attacked, this Pokémon will retaliate by sticking thick spines out from its body. It's a risky move that puts everything on the line.

name: Chandelure

attacks.name: Combustion Chain
attacks.text: This attack does 50 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: In homes illuminated by Chandelure instead of lights, funerals were a constant occurrence—or so it's said.

name: Larvesta

attacks.name: Take Down
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: This Pokémon was called the Larva That Stole the Sun. The fire Larvesta spouts from its horns can cut right through a sheet of iron.

name: Charcadet
flavorText: Burnt charcoal came to life and became a Pokémon. Possessing a fiery fighting spirit, Charcadet will battle even tough opponents.

name: Carvanha
flavorText: These Pokémon have sharp fangs and powerful jaws. Sailors avoid Carvanha dens at all costs.

name: Palpitoad
flavorText: On occasion, their cries are sublimely pleasing to the ear. Palpitoad with larger lumps on their bodies can sing with a wider range of sounds.

name: Froakie

attacks.name: Try Bouncing
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: It protects its skin by covering its body in delicate bubbles. Beneath its happy-go-lucky air, it keeps a watchful eye on its surroundings.

name: Frogadier

attacks.name: Strafe
attacks.text: You may switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: Its swiftness is unparalleled. It can scale a tower of more than 600 metres in a minute's time.

name: Wugtrio

attacks.name: Entwining Entrapment
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

flavorText: It has a vicious temperament, contrary to what its appearance may suggest. It wraps its long bodies around prey, then drags the prey into its den.

name: Finizen
flavorText: It likes playing with others of its kind using the water ring on its tail. It uses ultrasonic waves to sense the emotions of other living creatures.

name: Pawmot ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Levin Strike
attacks.text: Discard 2 Lightning Energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 220 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Tadbulb

attacks.name: Thunder Jolt
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: Tadbulb shakes its tail to generate electricity. If it senses danger, it will make its head blink on and off to alert its allies.

name: Bellibolt

abilities.name: Insulator
abilities.text: Prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from your opponent's Lightning Pokémon.

attacks.name: Thunderous Edge
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: When this Pokémon expands and contracts its wobbly body, the belly-button dynamo in its stomach produces a huge amount of electricity.

name: Miraidon ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Rapid Draw
attacks.text: Draw 2 cards.

attacks.name: Techno Turbo
attacks.text: Attach a Basic Lightning Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

name: Togetic

attacks.name: Shared Peace
attacks.text: Each player draws 3 cards.

flavorText: It grows dispirited if it is not with kind people. It can float in midair without moving its wings.

name: Grumpig

attacks.name: Powerful Steps
attacks.text: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Energy cards and attach them to your Pokémon in any way you like. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: It can perform odd dance steps to influence foes. Its style of dancing became hugely popular overseas.

name: Solrock

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.text: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Pokémon and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: Solar energy is the source of its power, so it is strong during the daytime. When it spins, its body shines.

name: Polteageist

attacks.name: Antique Collecting
attacks.text: Put up to 2 in any combination of Item cards and Pokémon Tool cards from your discard pile into your hand.

attacks.name: Pour Tea
attacks.text: Put 5 damage counters on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: The tea that composes Polteageist's body has a distinct and enjoyable flavor. Drinking too much, however, can be fatal.

name: Houndstone

attacks.name: Two Four-ocious
attacks.text: If your opponent has exactly 2 or 4 Prize cards remaining, this attack does 120 more damage.

flavorText: Houndstone spends most of its time sleeping in graveyards. Among all the dog Pokémon, this one is most loyal to its master.

name: Houndstone ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Big Bite
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

attacks.name: Last Respects
attacks.text: This attack does 10 more damage for each Psychic Pokémon in your discard pile.

name: Dugtrio

attacks.name: Dig
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from and effects of attacks done to this Pokémon.

flavorText: Its three heads bob separately up and down to loosen the soil nearby, making it easier for it to burrow.

name: Diggersby

attacks.name: Knocking Hammer
attacks.text: Discard the top card of your opponent's deck.

flavorText: The fur on its belly retains heat exceptionally well. People used to make heavy winter clothing from fur shed by this Pokémon.

name: Toedscool
flavorText: Toedscool lives in muggy forests. The flaps that fall from its body are chewy and very delicious.

name: Glimmet

attacks.name: Poison Shard
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavorText: It absorbs nutrients from cave walls. The petals it wears are made of crystallized poison.

name: Glimmora ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Dust Field
abilities.text: As long as this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, your opponent can't have more than 3 Benched Pokémon. If they have 4 or more Benched Pokémon, they discard Benched Pokémon until they have 3 Pokémon on the Bench. If more than one effect changes the number of Benched Pokémon allowed, use the smaller number.

attacks.name: Poisonous Gem
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

name: Charizard ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.
Tera: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks (both yours and your opponent's).

abilities.name: Infernal Reign
abilities.text: When you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon during your turn, you may search your deck for up to 3 Basic Fire Energy cards and attach them to your Pokémon in any way you like. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Burning Darkness
attacks.text: This attack does 30 more damage for each Prize card your opponent has taken.

name: Paldean Wooper

attacks.name: Spit Poison
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavorText: After losing a territorial struggle, Wooper began living on land. The Pokémon changed over time, developing a poisonous film to protect its body.

name: Houndour
flavorText: It is smart enough to hunt in packs. It uses a variety of cries for communicating with others.

name: Houndour

attacks.name: Coordinated Pack
attacks.text: For each of your Benched Houndour, search your deck for a Basic Darkness Energy card and attach it to that Houndour. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Focus Fangs
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: It is smart enough to hunt in packs. It uses a variety of cries for communicating with others.

name: Houndoom

attacks.name: Daring Strike
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is an Evolution Pokémon, this attack does 70 more damage.

attacks.name: Shadow Slash
attacks.text: Discard an Energy from this Pokémon.

flavorText: If you are burned by the flames it shoots from its mouth, the pain will never go away.

name: Scizor

attacks.name: Punishing Scissors
attacks.text: This attack does 50 more damage for each of your opponent's Pokémon in play that has an Ability.

flavorText: This Pokémon's pincers, which contain steel, can crush any hard object they get ahold of into bits.

name: Darkrai

attacks.name: Dark Slumber
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Night Cyclone
attacks.text: Move all Energy from this Pokémon to your Benched Pokémon in any way you like.

flavorText: It can lull people to sleep and make them dream. It is active during nights of the new moon.

name: Skarmory

attacks.name: Slashing Steel
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Slashing Steel.

flavorText: People fashion swords from Skarmory's shed feathers, so this Pokémon is a popular element in heraldic designs.

name: Salandit
flavorText: It taunts its prey and lures them into narrow, rocky areas where it then sprays them with toxic gas to make them dizzy and take them down.

name: Togedemaru

attacks.name: Defense Curl
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks.

flavorText: When it's in trouble, it curls up into a ball, makes its fur spikes stand on end, and then discharges electricity indiscriminately.

name: Bronzor

attacks.name: Mirror Draw
attacks.text: Draw cards until you have the same number of cards in your hand as your opponent.

flavorText: Ancient people believed that the pattern on Bronzor's back contained a mysterious power.

name: Meltan
flavorText: They live as a group, but when the time comes, one strong Meltan will absorb all the others and evolve.

name: Bronzong

attacks.name: Oracle Press
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, prevent all effects of attacks used by your opponent's Pokémon done to this Pokémon. (Damage is not an effect.)

attacks.name: Extrasensory
attacks.text: If you have the same number of cards in your hand as your opponent, this attack does 90 more damage.

flavorText: In ages past, this Pokémon was revered as a bringer of rain. It was found buried in the ground.

name: Melmetal ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Metal-bolize
attacks.text: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Metal Energy cards and attach them to this Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Full Metal Knuckle
attacks.text: This attack does 30 more damage for each Metal Energy attached to this Pokémon.

name: Bisharp

attacks.name: Fury Cutter
attacks.text: Flip 3 coins. If 1 of them is heads, this attack does 20 more damage. If 2 of them are heads, this attack does 60 more damage. If all of them are heads, this attack does 120 more damage.

flavorText: This Pokémon commands a group of several Pawniard. Groups that are defeated in territorial disputes are absorbed by the winning side.

name: Dragonair

attacks.name: Dragon Tail
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 70 damage for each heads.

flavorText: They say that if it emits an aura from its whole body, the weather will begin to change instantly.

name: Kingambit

attacks.name: Strike Down
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon has 4 or more damage counters on it, that Pokémon is Knocked Out.

flavorText: Only a Bisharp that stands above all others in its vast army can evolve into Kingambit.

name: Pidgey
flavorText: It is docile and prefers to avoid conflict. If disturbed, however, it can ferociously strike back.

name: Inkay

attacks.name: Hug
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

flavorText: By exposing foes to the blinking of its luminescent spots, Inkay demoralizes them, and then it seizes the chance to flee.

name: Umbreon

attacks.name: Feint Attack
attacks.text: This attack does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance, or by any effects on that Pokémon.

attacks.name: Pitch-Black Blade
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

flavorText: When exposed to the moon's aura, the rings on its body glow faintly and it gains a mysterious power.

name: Malamar

abilities.name: Psychic Insight
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may look at the top card of your opponent's deck. If you do, look at the top card of your deck.

attacks.name: Hypnotic Ray
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavorText: It's said that Malamar's hypnotic powers played a role in certain history-changing events.

name: Salazzle
flavorText: Salazzle makes its opponents light-headed with poisonous gas, then captivates them with alluring movements to turn them into loyal servants.

name: Mawile

abilities.name: Special Eater
abilities.text: When you play this Pokémon from your hand onto your Bench during your turn, you may discard a Special Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: It chomps with its gaping mouth. Its huge jaws are actually steel horns that have been transformed.

name: Excadrill
flavorText: Known as the Drill King, this Pokémon can tunnel through the terrain at speeds of over 90 mph.

name: Dratini
flavorText: It sheds many layers of skin as it grows larger. During this process, it is protected by a rapid waterfall.

name: Dragonite ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.
Tera: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks (both yours and your opponent's).

attacks.name: Mighty Meteor
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 140 more damage. If tails, during your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

name: Drampa

attacks.name: Outrage
attacks.text: This attack does 10 more damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.

flavorText: Drampa is a kind and friendly Pokémon—up until it's angered. When that happens, it stirs up a gale and flattens everything around.

name: Houndoom ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Evil Claw
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon is a Basic Pokémon, it can't attack during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Hound's Fang
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

name: Absol ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Future Sight
attacks.text: Look at the top 3 cards of either player's deck and put them back in any order.

attacks.name: Cursed Slug
attacks.text: If your opponent has 3 or fewer cards in their hand, this attack does 120 more damage.

name: Probopass

attacks.name: Triple Nose
attacks.text: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 40 damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Iron Buster
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

flavorText: It uses three small units to catch prey and battle enemies. The main body mostly just gives orders.

name: Pawniard

attacks.name: Triple Cutter
attacks.text: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage for each heads.

flavorText: Pawniard will fearlessly challenge even powerful foes. In a pinch, it will cling to opponents and pierce them with the blades all over its body.

name: Varoom

attacks.name: Spinning Draw
attacks.text: Draw a card.

flavorText: It is said that this Pokémon was born when an unknown poison Pokémon entered and inspirited an engine left at a scrap-processing factory.

name: Varoom
flavorText: It is said that this Pokémon was born when an unknown poison Pokémon entered and inspirited an engine left at a scrap-processing factory.

name: Revavroom ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Tune-Up
abilities.text: This Pokémon may have up to 4 Pokémon Tools attached to it. If it loses this Ability, discard Pokémon Tools from it until only 1 remains.

attacks.name: Wild Drift
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 30 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

name: Altaria

attacks.name: Soothing Lullaby
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep. During Pokémon Checkup, your opponent flips 2 coins instead of 1. If either of them is tails, that Pokémon is still Asleep.

flavorText: If it bonds with a person, it will gently envelop the friend with its soft wings, then hum.

name: Pidgeot ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Quick Search
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may search your deck for a card and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck. You can't use more than 1 Quick Search Ability each turn.

attacks.name: Blustery Wind
attacks.text: You may discard a Stadium in play.

name: Kangaskhan

attacks.name: Spike Draw
attacks.text: Draw 2 cards.

flavorText: There are records of a lost human child being raised by a childless Kangaskhan.

name: Pidgeotto
flavorText: Very protective of its sprawling territorial area, this Pokémon will fiercely peck at any intruder.

name: Eevee

attacks.name: Cheer Up
attacks.text: Attach an Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Pokémon.

flavorText: Its ability to evolve into many forms allows it to adapt smoothly and perfectly to any environment.

name: Linoone

attacks.name: Reckless Charge
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

flavorText: It uses its explosive speed and razor-sharp claws to bring down prey. Running along winding paths is not its strong suit.

name: Zigzagoon
flavorText: A Pokémon with abundant curiosity. It shows an interest in everything, so it always zigzags.

name: Swablu

attacks.name: Fluffy Guard
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 20 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

flavorText: It constantly grooms its cotton-like wings. It takes a shower to clean itself if it becomes dirty.

name: Lillipup
flavorText: This Pokémon is far brighter than the average child, and Lillipup won't forget the love it receives or any abuse it suffers.

name: Bouffalant

abilities.name: Bouffer
abilities.text: This Pokémon takes 20 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Damage Rush
attacks.text: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 30 more damage for each heads.

flavorText: These Pokémon live in herds of about 20 individuals. Bouffalant that betray the herd will lose the hair on their heads for some reason.

name: Yungoos

attacks.name: Knock Away
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 more damage.

flavorText: Its stomach fills most of its torso. It wanders the same path every day, searching for fresh food.

name: Greedent ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.
Tera: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks (both yours and your opponent's).

attacks.name: Never Ever Enough
attacks.text: Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. You may put those cards into your hand. If you don't, discard those cards and draw 3 cards.

attacks.name: Slip 'n' Roll
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Slip 'n' Roll.

name: Lechonk

attacks.name: Disarming Voice
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: It searches for food all day. It possesses a keen sense of smell but doesn't use it for anything other than foraging.

name: Geeta
rules: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Energy cards and attach them to 1 of your Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck. During this turn, your Pokémon can't attack. (This includes Pokémon that come into play this turn.)
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

name: Letter of Encouragement
rules: You can use this card only if any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out during your opponent's last turn.
Search your deck for up to 3 Basic Energy cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
You may play any number of Item cards during your turn.

name: Bunnelby

attacks.name: Stompy Stomp
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 10 damage for each heads.

flavorText: It's very sensitive to danger. The sound of Corviknight's flapping will have Bunnelby digging a hole to hide underground in moments.

name: Gumshoos

attacks.name: Crunch
attacks.text: Discard an Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: Once it finds signs of prey, it will patiently stake out the location, waiting until the sun goes down.

name: Lechonk
flavorText: It searches for food all day. It possesses a keen sense of smell but doesn't use it for anything other than foraging.

name: Ortega
rules: Your opponent reveals their hand, and you choose a card you find there and put it on the bottom of their deck. If you put a card on the bottom of your opponent's deck in this way, your opponent may draw a card.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

name: Stoutland

attacks.name: Chomp Chomp Panic
attacks.text: This attack does 50 damage for each Colorless in your opponent's Active Pokémon's Retreat Cost.

flavorText: Stoutland is immensely proud of its impressive moustache. It's said that moustache length is what determines social standing among this species.

name: Audino

attacks.name: Find a Friend
attacks.text: Search your deck for a Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: This Pokémon has a kind heart. By touching with its feelers, Audino can gauge other creatures' feelings and physical conditions.

name: Oinkologne

attacks.name: Finest Selection
attacks.text: Flip 3 coins. Put a number of cards up to the number of heads from your discard pile into your hand.

attacks.name: Perfume Press
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: This Pokémon sends a flowerlike scent wafting about. Well-developed muscles in its legs allow it to leap more than 16 feet with no trouble at all.

name: Flamigo

attacks.name: Synchronized Feathers
attacks.text: If Flamigo is on your Bench, this attack also does 60 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: This Pokémon apparently ties the base of its neck into a knot so that the energy stored in its belly does not escape from its beak.

name: Arven
rules: Search your deck for an Item card and a Pokémon Tool card, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

name: Brassius
rules: Count the cards in your hand, shuffle those cards into your deck, then draw that many cards plus 1.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

name: Herdier
flavorText: The black fur that covers this Pokémon's body is dense and springy. Even sharp fangs bounce right off.

name: Skwovet

attacks.name: Nicked Nibble
attacks.text: Discard the top card of your opponent's deck.

flavorText: It stores berries in its cheeks. When there are no berries to be found, Skwovet will stuff pebbles into its cheeks to stave off its cravings.

name: Lechonk
flavorText: It searches for food all day. It possesses a keen sense of smell but doesn't use it for anything other than foraging.

name: Oinkologne

attacks.name: Confounding Cologne
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: High-Impact Kick
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this Pokémon also does 60 damage to itself.

flavorText: Oinkologne is proud of its fine, glossy skin. It emits a concentrated scent from the tip of its tail.

name: Patrol Cap
rules: As long as the Pokémon this card is attached to is in the Active Spot, cards in your deck can't be discarded by effects of your opponent's attacks, Abilities, Item cards, Pokémon Tool cards, or Supporter cards.
You may attach any number of Pokémon Tools to your Pokémon during your turn. You may attach only 1 Pokémon Tool to each Pokémon, and it stays attached.

name: Poppy
rules: Move up to 2 Energy from 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

name: Vengeful Punch
rules: If the Pokémon this card is attached to is Knocked Out by damage from an attack from your opponent's Pokémon, put 4 damage counters on the Attacking Pokémon.
You may attach any number of Pokémon Tools to your Pokémon during your turn. You may attach only 1 Pokémon Tool to each Pokémon, and it stays attached.

name: Pokémon League Headquarters
rules: Attacks used by each Basic Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) cost Colorless more.
You may play only 1 Stadium card during your turn. Put it next to the Active Spot, and discard it if another Stadium comes into play. A Stadium with the same name can't be played.

name: Palafin

attacks.name: Jet Punch
attacks.text: This attack also does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Justice Kick
attacks.text: If this Pokémon didn't move from the Bench to the Active Spot this turn, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: This Pokémon's ancient genes have awakened. It is now so extraordinarily strong that it can easily lift a cruise ship with one fin.

name: Team Star Grunt
rules: Put an Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon on top of their deck.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

name: Ninetales

attacks.name: Nine-Tailed Dance
attacks.text: Put 9 damage counters on 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

flavorText: Very smart and very vengeful. Grabbing one of its many tails could result in a 1,000-year curse.

abilities.name: Precious Gift

attacks.name: Power Cyclone
attacks.text: Move an Energy from this Pokémon to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

name: Mawile

abilities.name: Special Eater
abilities.text: When you play this Pokémon from your hand onto your Bench during your turn, you may discard a Special Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

name: Pawmi

attacks.name: Static Slap
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: It has underdeveloped electric sacs on its cheeks. These sacs can produce electricity only if Pawmi rubs them furiously with the pads on its forepaws.

name: Paldean Wooper

attacks.name: Splattering Poison
attacks.text: Both Active Pokémon are now Poisoned.

flavorText: After losing a territorial struggle, Wooper began living on land. The Pokémon changed over time, developing a poisonous film to protect its body.

name: Houndstone

attacks.name: Delve
attacks.text: Put up to 2 Item cards from your discard pile into your hand.

flavorText: Houndstone spends most of its time sleeping in graveyards. Among all the dog Pokémon, this one is most loyal to its master.

name: Eevee

attacks.name: Call for Family

flavorText: Its ability to evolve into many forms allows it to adapt smoothly and perfectly to any environment.

name: Charmander

attacks.name: Heat Tackle
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: From the time it is born, a flame burns at the tip of its tail. Its life would end if the flame were to go out.

name: Ivysaur

attacks.name: Leech Seed
attacks.text: Heal 20 damage from this Pokémon.

flavorText: Exposure to sunlight adds to its strength. Sunlight also makes the bud on its back grow larger.

name: Bulbasaur

attacks.name: Leech Seed

flavorText: While it is young, it uses the nutrients that are stored in the seed on its back in order to grow.
