attacks.name: Slow-Acting Syncope
attacks.text: At the end of your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon will be Knocked Out.

flavorText: Searching for an opponent to test its skills against, it emerges onto land. Once the battle is over, it returns to the sea.

name: Abomasnow

abilities.name: Freezing Disaster
abilities.text: Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's) can't be healed.

flavorText: It lives a quiet life on mountains that are perpetually covered in snow. It hides itself by whipping up blizzards.

name: Paldean Wooper

attacks.name: Find a Home
attacks.text: Search your deck for a Stadium card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: After losing a territorial struggle, Wooper began living on land. The Pokémon changed over time, developing a poisonous film to protect its body.

name: Varoom

attacks.name: Rev
attacks.text: Put up to 2 Basic Energy cards from your discard pile into your hand.

flavorText: It is said that this Pokémon was born when an unknown poison Pokémon entered and inspirited an engine left at a scrap-processing factory.

name: Cyclizar

attacks.name: Acceleration Drive
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from and effects of attacks done to this Pokémon.

flavorText: Apparently Cyclizar has been allowing people to ride on its back since ancient times. Depictions of this have been found in 10,000-year-old murals.

name: Oinkologne

attacks.name: Finest Selection
attacks.text: Flip 3 coins. Put a number of cards up to the number of heads from your discard pile into your hand.

attacks.name: Perfume Press
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: This Pokémon sends a flowerlike scent wafting about. Well-developed muscles in its legs allow it to leap more than 16 feet with no trouble at all.

name: Tandemaus

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.text: Draw 2 cards.

flavorText: Exhibiting great teamwork, they use their incisors to cut pieces out of any material that might be useful for a nest, then make off with them.

name: Clive
rules: Your opponent reveals their hand, and you draw 2 cards for each Supporter card you find there.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

name: Nemona
rules: Draw 3 cards.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

name: Professor's Research
rules: Discard your hand and draw 7 cards.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

name: Professor's Research
rules: Discard your hand and draw 7 cards.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

name: Rare Candy
rules: Choose 1 of your Basic Pokémon in play. If you have a Stage 2 card in your hand that evolves from that Pokémon, put that card onto the Basic Pokémon to evolve it, skipping the Stage 1. You can't use this card during your first turn or on a Basic Pokémon that was put into play this turn.
You may play any number of Item cards during your turn.

name: Gloom

abilities.name: Semi-Blooming Energy
abilities.text: When you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon during your turn, you may look at the top 3 cards of your deck and attach any number of Basic Energy cards you find there to your Pokémon in any way you like. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

flavorText: What appears to be drool is actually sweet honey. It is very sticky and clings stubbornly if touched.

name: Smoliv

attacks.name: Nutrients
attacks.text: Heal 30 damage from 1 of your Pokémon.

flavorText: It protects itself from enemies by emitting oil from the fruit on its head. This oil is bitter and astringent enough to make someone flinch.

name: Ralts
flavorText: The horns on its head provide a strong power that enables it to sense people's emotions.

name: Mime Jr.

attacks.name: Mimed Games
attacks.text: Your opponent chooses an attack from 1 of their Pokémon in play. Use the chosen attack as this attack.

flavorText: In an attempt to confuse its enemy, it mimics the enemy's movements. Then it wastes no time in making itself scarce!

name: Cottonee

attacks.name: Fickle Attack
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: Weaving together the cotton of both Cottonee and Eldegoss produces exquisite cloth that's highly prized by many luxury brands.

name: Ceruledge

attacks.name: Life Sucker
attacks.text: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Fighting Sword
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon ex or Pokémon V, this attack does 100 more damage.

flavorText: The fiery blades on its arms burn fiercely with the lingering resentment of a sword wielder who fell before accomplishing their goal.

name: Primeape

attacks.name: Raging Punch
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 20 damage to itself.

flavorText: Some researchers theorize that Primeape remains angry even when inside a Poké Ball.

name: Donphan

attacks.name: Cragalanche
attacks.text: Discard the top 2 cards of your opponent's deck.

attacks.name: Powerful Spin
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

flavorText: Donphan is covered in tough hide, so even being hit by a car won't faze this Pokémon. However, it is extremely susceptible to rain.

name: Great Tusk ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Quaking Demolition
abilities.text: Once at the end of your turn (after your attack), if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you must discard the top 5 cards of your deck.

attacks.name: Great Bash
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

name: Scrafty

attacks.name: Lambaste
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon is a Basic Pokémon, it can't attack during your opponent's next turn.

flavorText: While mostly known for having the temperament of an aggressive ruffian, this Pokémon takes very good care of its family, friends, and territory.

name: Revavroom

abilities.name: Rumbling Engine
abilities.text: You must discard an Energy card from your hand in order to use this Ability. Once during your turn, you may draw cards until you have 6 cards in your hand.

attacks.name: Knock Away
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 90 more damage.

flavorText: It creates a gas out of poison and minerals from rocks. It then detonates the gas in its cylinders— now numbering eight—to generate energy.

name: Noibat
flavorText: This Pokémon emits ultrasonic waves from its large ears to search for fruit to eat. It mistakes Applin for its food.

name: Noivern ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Covert Flight
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from Basic Pokémon.

attacks.name: Dominating Echo
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, they can't play any Special Energy or Stadium cards from their hand.

name: Artazon
rules: Once during each player's turn, that player may search their deck for a Basic Pokémon that doesn't have a Rule Box and put it onto their Bench. Then, that player shuffles their deck. (Pokémon ex, Pokémon V, etc. have Rule Boxes.)
You may play only 1 Stadium card during your turn. Put it next to the Active Spot, and discard it if another Stadium comes into play. A Stadium with the same name can't be played.

name: Atticus
rules: You can use this card only if your opponent's Active Pokémon is Poisoned.
Shuffle your hand into your deck. Then, draw 7 cards.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

name: Oddish
flavorText: During the day, it stays in the cold underground to avoid the sun. It grows by bathing in moonlight.

name: Hoppip

attacks.name: Splashing Dodge
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from and effects of attacks done to this Pokémon.

flavorText: This Pokémon is blown across vast distances by the wind. It is unclear where the Hoppip of Paldea originally came from.

name: Skiploom

abilities.name: Drifting Dodge
abilities.text: If any damage is done to this Pokémon by attacks, flip a coin. If heads, prevent that damage.

attacks.name: Flowery Zephyr
attacks.text: This attack also does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: Skiploom enthusiasts can apparently tell where a Skiploom was born by the scent drifting from the flower on the Pokémon's head.

name: Jumpluff

abilities.name: Drifting Dodge
abilities.text: If any damage is done to this Pokémon by attacks, flip a coin. If heads, prevent that damage.

attacks.name: Fluffy Breeze
attacks.text: This attack also does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: Jumpluff travels on seasonal winds. Once its cotton spores run out, its journey ends, as does its life.

name: Dolliv

attacks.name: Apply Oil
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, if the Defending Pokémon tries to attack, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack doesn't happen.

flavorText: Dolliv shares its tasty, fresh-scented oil with others. This species has coexisted with humans since times long gone.

name: Arboliva

abilities.name: Enriching Oil
abilities.text: When you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon during your turn, you may heal all damage from 1 of your Pokémon.

flavorText: This calm Pokémon is very compassionate. It will share its delicious, nutrient-rich oil with weakened Pokémon.

name: Kirlia

attacks.name: Psychic
attacks.text: This attack does 20 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: It has a psychic power that enables it to distort the space around it and see into the future.

name: Whimsicott
flavorText: As long as this Pokémon bathes in sunlight, its cotton keeps growing. If too much cotton fluff builds up, Whimsicott tears it off and scatters it.

name: Mimikyu

abilities.name: Safeguard
abilities.text: Prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from your opponent's Pokémon ex and Pokémon V.

attacks.name: Ghost Eye
attacks.text: Put 7 damage counters on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: This Pokémon lives in dark places untouched by sunlight. When it appears before humans, it hides itself under a cloth that resembles a Pikachu.

name: Greavard

attacks.name: Graveyard Gamboling
attacks.text: This attack does 10 damage for each Psychic Pokémon in your discard pile.

flavorText: This friendly Pokémon doesn't like being alone. Pay it even the slightest bit of attention, and it will follow you forever.

name: Mankey

attacks.name: Monkey Beatdown
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: It is extremely quick to anger. It could be docile one moment, then thrashing away the next instant.

name: Phanpy
flavorText: This Pokémon lives and nests on a riverbank. After playing in the mud, it won't be able to settle down unless it washes its body.

name: Charizard ex
rules: Tera: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks (both yours and your opponent's).
Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Infernal Reign
abilities.text: When you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon during your turn, you may search your deck for up to 3 Basic Fire Energy cards and attach them to your Pokémon in any way you like. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Burning Darkness
attacks.text: This attack does 30 more damage for each Prize card your opponent has taken.

name: Gastly

attacks.name: Allure
attacks.text: Draw a card.

flavorText: It wraps its opponent in its gas-like body, slowly weakening its prey by poisoning it through the skin.

name: Haunter

attacks.name: Dark Slumber
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavorText: It likes to lurk in the dark and tap shoulders with a gaseous hand. Its touch causes endless shuddering.

name: Gengar

abilities.name: Night Gate
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Nightmare
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavorText: To steal the life of its target, it slips into the prey's shadow and silently waits for an opportunity.

name: Paldean Clodsire ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Toxic Wetland
abilities.text: Once during your turn, if a Stadium is in play, you may make your opponent's Active Pokémon Poisoned.

attacks.name: Needle Bone
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, during your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

name: Maschiff

attacks.name: Ambush
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavorText: It always scowls in an attempt to make opponents take it seriously, but even crying children will burst into laughter when they see Maschiff's face.

name: Mabosstiff

abilities.name: Intimidating Howl
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may switch out your opponent's Active Pokémon to the Bench. (Your opponent chooses the new Active Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Wild Tackle
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

flavorText: Mabosstiff loves playing with children. Though usually gentle, it takes on an intimidating look when protecting its family.

name: Iron Treads ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Iron-Clad Roll
attacks.text: After doing damage, you may discard all Future Booster Energy Capsules from this Pokémon. If you do, during your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 150 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

name: Gholdengo

attacks.name: Lavish Hospitality
attacks.text: You may attach any number of Basic Metal Energy cards from your hand to your Pokémon in any way you like.

attacks.name: Scintillating Surfing
attacks.text: Flip a coin for each Metal Energy attached to this Pokémon. This attack does 80 damage for each heads.

flavorText: Its body seems to be made up of 1,000 coins. This Pokémon gets along well with others and is quick to make friends with anybody.

name: Maushold

attacks.name: Family Attack
attacks.text: This attack does 70 damage for each of your Maushold in play.

flavorText: The larger pair protects the little ones during battles. When facing strong opponents, the whole group will join the fight.

name: Squawkabilly ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Squawk and Seize
abilities.text: Once during your first turn, you may discard your hand and draw 6 cards. You can't use more than 1 Squawk and Seize Ability during your turn.

attacks.name: Motivate
attacks.text: Attach up to 2 Basic Energy cards from your discard pile to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

name: Iono
rules: Each player shuffles their hand and puts it on the bottom of their deck. If either player put any cards on the bottom of their deck in this way, each player draws a card for each of their remaining Prize cards.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

name: Moonlit Hill
rules: Once during each player's turn, that player may discard a Basic Psychic Energy card from their hand in order to heal 30 damage from each of their Pokémon.
You may play only 1 Stadium card during your turn. Put it next to the Active Spot, and discard it if another Stadium comes into play. A Stadium with the same name can't be played.

name: Nemona's Backpack
rules: Put up to 2 Nemona cards from your discard pile into your hand.
You may play any number of Item cards during your turn.

name: Vileplume

abilities.name: Fully Blooming Energy
abilities.text: When you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon during your turn, you may look at the top 8 cards of your deck and attach any number of Basic Energy cards you find there to your Pokémon in any way you like. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

flavorText: The larger its petals, the more toxic pollen it contains. Its big head is heavy and hard to hold up.

name: Charmander

attacks.name: Blazing Destruction
attacks.text: Discard a Stadium in play.

flavorText: From the time it is born, a flame burns at the tip of its tail. Its life would end if the flame were to go out.

name: Entei

abilities.name: Pressure
abilities.text: As long as this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, attacks used by your opponent's Active Pokémon do 20 less damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Blaze Ball
attacks.text: This attack does 20 more damage for each Fire Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: It is said that when it roars, a volcano erupts somewhere around the globe.

name: Oricorio

abilities.name: Ardent Dancing
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may heal 20 damage from your Active Evolution Pokémon.

flavorText: This Pokémon is incredibly popular, possibly because its passionate dancing is a great match with the temperament of Paldean people.

name: Rellor

attacks.name: Ball Roll
attacks.text: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 30 damage for each heads.

flavorText: This Pokémon creates a mud ball by mixing sand and dirt with psychic energy. It treasures its mud ball more than its own life.

name: Charcadet
flavorText: Burnt charcoal came to life and became a Pokémon. Possessing a fiery fighting spirit, Charcadet will battle even tough opponents.

name: Armarouge

abilities.name: Fire Off
abilities.text: As often as you like during your turn, you may move a Fire Energy from 1 of your Benched Pokémon to your Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Flame Cannon
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

flavorText: Armarouge evolved through the use of a set of armor that belonged to a distinguished warrior. This Pokémon is incredibly loyal.

name: Slowpoke

attacks.name: Rest
attacks.text: This Pokémon is now Asleep. Heal 30 damage from it.

flavorText: It is always vacantly lost in thought, but no one knows what it is thinking about. It is good at fishing with its tail.

name: Slowbro

abilities.name: Strange Behavior
abilities.text: As often as you like during your turn, you may move 1 damage counter from 1 of your other Pokémon to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Bubble Drain
attacks.text: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

flavorText: If the tail-biting Shellder is thrown off in a harsh battle, this Pokémon reverts to being an ordinary Slowpoke.

name: Toedscool

attacks.name: Furious Kicks
attacks.text: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage for each heads.

flavorText: Though it looks like Tentacool, Toedscool is a completely different species. Its legs may be thin, but it can run at a speed of 30 mph.

name: Charmeleon

abilities.name: Flare Veil
abilities.text: Prevent all effects of attacks used by your opponent's Pokémon done to this Pokémon. (Damage is not an effect.)

flavorText: If it becomes agitated during battle, it spouts intense flames, incinerating its surroundings.

name: Paldean Tauros

attacks.name: Raging Horns
attacks.text: This attack does 10 more damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Blaze Dash
attacks.text: Discard an Energy from this Pokémon.

flavorText: People call this kind of Tauros the Blaze Breed due to the hot air it snorts from its nostrils. Its three tails are intertwined.

name: Staryu

attacks.name: Swift
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance, or by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: Fish Pokémon nibble at it, but Staryu isn't bothered. Its body regenerates quickly, even if part of it is completely torn off.

name: Capsakid

attacks.name: Increasing Spice
attacks.text: Search your deck for a Basic Fire Energy card and attach it to this Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: Traditional Paldean dishes can be extremely spicy because they include the shed front teeth of Capsakid among their ingredients.

name: Scovillain

abilities.name: Double Type
abilities.text: As long as this Pokémon is in play, it is Grass and Fire type.

attacks.name: Spicy Headbutt
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.

flavorText: The red head converts spicy chemicals into fire energy and blasts the surrounding area with a super spicy stream of flame.

name: Starmie

abilities.name: Mysterious Comet
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may put 2 damage counters on 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. If you placed any damage counters in this way, discard this Pokémon and all attached cards.

flavorText: Starmie swims by spinning its body at high speed. As this Pokémon cruises through the ocean, it absorbs tiny plankton.

name: Wugtrio

attacks.name: Undersea Tunnel
attacks.text: Flip 3 coins. For each heads, discard the top 3 cards of your opponent's deck.

flavorText: It has a vicious temperament, contrary to what its appearance may suggest. It wraps its long bodies around prey, then drags the prey into its den.

name: Palafin

attacks.name: Jet Punch
attacks.text: This attack also does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Justice Kick
attacks.text: If this Pokémon didn't move from the Bench to the Active Spot this turn, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: This Pokémon's ancient genes have awakened. It is now so extraordinarily strong that it can easily lift a cruise ship with one fin.

name: Frigibax

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.text: Draw a card.

flavorText: Frigibax absorbs heat through its dorsal fin and converts the heat into ice energy. The higher the temperature, the more energy Frigibax stores.

name: Electrode

attacks.name: Bang Boom Chain
attacks.text: Before doing damage, you may discard any number of Pokémon Tools from your Pokémon. This attack does 40 more damage for each card you discarded in this way.

flavorText: The more energy it charges up, the faster it gets. But this also makes it more likely to explode.

name: Luxio
flavorText: Strong electricity courses through the tips of its sharp claws. A light scratch causes fainting in foes.

name: Thundurus

abilities.name: Adverse Weather
abilities.text: As long as this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, prevent all damage done to your Benched Pokémon by attacks from your opponent's Pokémon.

attacks.name: Gigantic Bolt
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 90 damage to itself.

flavorText: As it flies around, it shoots lightning all over the place and causes forest fires. It is therefore disliked.

name: Tatsugiri

attacks.name: Mise en Place
attacks.text: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Water Energy cards and attach them to 1 of your Basic Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Curl Up
attacks.text: Put this Pokémon and all attached cards into your hand.

flavorText: This is a small dragon Pokémon. It lives inside the mouth of Dondozo to protect itself from enemies on the outside.

name: Arctibax
flavorText: Arctibax freezes the air around it, protecting its face with an ice mask and turning its dorsal fin into a blade of ice.

name: Baxcalibur

abilities.name: Super Cold
abilities.text: As often as you like during your turn, you may attach a Basic Water Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Pokémon.

flavorText: This Pokémon blasts cryogenic air out from its mouth. This air can instantly freeze even liquid-hot lava.

name: Voltorb

attacks.name: Tumbling Attack
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavorText: It rolls to move. If the ground is uneven, a sudden jolt from hitting a bump can cause it to explode.

name: Paldean Tauros

attacks.name: Raging Horns
attacks.text: This attack does 10 more damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Aqua Dive
attacks.text: This attack does 60 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: It swims by jetting water from its horns. The most notable characteristic of the Aqua Breed is its high body fat, which allows it to float easily.

name: Veluza

attacks.name: Slim Screw
attacks.text: If you have no cards in your hand, this attack can be used for Water.

flavorText: When Veluza discards unnecessary flesh, its mind becomes honed and its psychic power increases. The spare flesh has a mild but delicious flavor.

name: Dondozo

attacks.name: Release Rage
attacks.text: This attack does 50 damage for each Tatsugiri in your discard pile.

flavorText: This Pokémon is a glutton, but it's bad at getting food. It teams up with a Tatsugiri to catch prey.

name: Pikachu

attacks.name: Growl
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon's attacks do 20 less damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

flavorText: ﻿When it is angered, it immediately discharges the energy stored in the pouches in its cheeks.

name: Pachirisu

abilities.name: Electricity Pouches
abilities.text: This Pokémon can't be Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Everyone Discharge
attacks.text: This attack does 20 more damage for each of your Benched Lightning Pokémon. This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness.

flavorText: A pair may be seen rubbing their cheek pouches together in an effort to share stored electricity.

name: Wiglett

attacks.name: Twisting Strike
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from and effects of attacks done to this Pokémon.

flavorText: This Pokémon can pick up the scent of a Veluza just over 65 feet away and will hide itself in the sand.

name: Finizen

attacks.name: Valiant Evolution
attacks.text: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon. If you do, search your deck for a card that evolves from this Pokémon and put it onto this Pokémon to evolve it. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: It likes playing with others of its kind using the water ring on its tail. It uses ultrasonic waves to sense the emotions of other living creatures.

name: Raichu

abilities.name: Electrical Grounding
abilities.text: When 1 of your Pokémon is Knocked Out by damage from an attack from your opponent's Pokémon, you may move a Lightning Energy from that Pokémon to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Thunder
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 50 damage to itself.

flavorText: Its tail discharges electricity into the ground, protecting it from getting shocked.

name: Shinx

attacks.name: Wild Kick
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: The extension and contraction of its muscles generates electricity. It glows when in trouble.

name: Luxray

abilities.name: Swelling Flash
abilities.text: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is in your hand and you have more Prize cards remaining than your opponent, you may put this Pokémon onto your Bench.

attacks.name: Wild Charge
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 20 damage to itself.

flavorText: It can see clearly through walls to track down its prey and seek its lost young.

name: Pawmi
flavorText: The pads of its paws are electricity-discharging organs. Pawmi fires electricity from its forepaws while standing unsteadily on its hind legs.

name: Pawmot

abilities.name: Electrogenesis
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may search your deck for a Basic Lightning Energy card and attach it to this Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Electro Paws
attacks.text: Discard all Energy from this Pokémon.

flavorText: Pawmot's fluffy fur acts as a battery. It can store the same amount of electricity as an electric car.

name: Wattrel

attacks.name: United Wings
attacks.text: This attack does 20 damage for each Pokémon in your discard pile that has the United Wings attack.

flavorText: When its wings catch the wind, the bones within produce electricity. This Pokémon dives into the ocean, catching prey by electrocuting them.

name: Toxtricity

attacks.name: Leer
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Loud Mix
attacks.text: This attack does 30 more damage for each different type of Pokémon on your Bench.

flavorText: Many youths admire the way this Pokémon listlessly picks fights and keeps its cool no matter what opponent it faces.

name: Kilowattrel

attacks.name: United Thunder
attacks.text: This attack does 10 damage for each Pokémon in your discard pile that has the United Wings attack to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: Kilowattrel inflates its throat sac to amplify its electricity. By riding the wind, this Pokémon can fly over 430 miles in a day.

name: Toxel

attacks.name: Slight Intrusion
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: It has no problem drinking dirty water. An organ inside Toxel's body filters such water into a poisonous liquid that is harmless to Toxel.

name: Pawmo

attacks.name: Thunder Shock
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: Pawmo uses a unique fighting technique in which it uses its forepaws to strike foes and zap them with electricity from its paw pads simultaneously.

name: Wigglytuff

abilities.name: Balloon Therapy
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may attach a Therapeutic Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Pokémon.

flavorText: It has a very fine fur. Take care not to make it angry, or it may inflate steadily and hit with a body slam.

name: Abra
flavorText: Abra can teleport in its sleep. Apparently the more deeply Abra sleeps, the farther its teleportations go.

name: Natu

attacks.name: Triple Strike
attacks.text: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage for each heads.

flavorText: Because its wings aren't yet fully grown, it has to hop to get around. It is always staring at something.

name: Xatu

abilities.name: Clairvoyant Sense
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may attach a Basic Psychic Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Benched Pokémon. If you attached Energy to a Pokémon in this way, draw 2 cards.

flavorText: This odd Pokémon can see both the past and the future. It eyes the sun's movement all day.

name: Ralts
flavorText: The horns on its head provide a strong power that enables it to sense people's emotions.

name: Kirlia

attacks.name: Psychic
attacks.text: This attack does 20 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: It has a psychic power that enables it to distort the space around it and see into the future.

name: Drifloon

attacks.name: Balloon Blast
attacks.text: This attack does 30 damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.

flavorText: It is whispered that any child who mistakes Drifloon for a balloon and holds on to it could wind up missing.

name: Drifblim

attacks.name: Curse Spreading
attacks.text: Put 8 damage counters on your opponent's Pokémon in any way you like.

flavorText: It can generate and release gas within its body. That's how it can control the altitude of its drift.

name: Spiritomb

abilities.name: Fettered in Misfortune
abilities.text: Basic Pokémon V in play (both yours and your opponent's) have no Abilities.

attacks.name: Fade Out
attacks.text: Put this Pokémon and all attached cards into your hand.

flavorText: Its constant mischief and misdeeds resulted in it being bound to an Odd Keystone by a mysterious spell.

name: Tinkatink

attacks.name: Scrap Pickup
attacks.text: Put an Item card from your discard pile into your hand.

flavorText: It swings its handmade hammer around to protect itself, but the hammer is often stolen by Pokémon that eat metal.

name: Annihilape

attacks.name: Rage Fist
attacks.text: This attack does 70 damage for each Prize card your opponent has taken.

attacks.name: Dynamite Punch
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 50 damage to itself.

flavorText: It imbues its fists with the power of the rage that it kept hidden in its heart. Opponents struck by these imbued fists will be shattered to their core.

name: Nacli

attacks.name: Salt Coating
attacks.text: Heal 20 damage from 1 of your Pokémon.

flavorText: It was born in a layer of rock salt deep under the earth. This species was particularly treasured in the old days, as they would share precious salt.

name: Garganacl

abilities.name: Blessed Salt
abilities.text: During Pokémon Checkup, heal 20 damage from each of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Knocking Hammer
attacks.text: Discard the top card of your opponent's deck.

flavorText: Garganacl will rub its fingertips together and sprinkle injured Pokémon with salt. Even severe wounds will promptly heal afterward.

name: Paldean Wooper

attacks.name: Find a Home
attacks.text: Search your deck for a Stadium card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: After losing a territorial struggle, Wooper began living on land. The Pokémon changed over time, developing a poisonous film to protect its body.

name: Pawniard
flavorText: Pawniard will fearlessly challenge even powerful foes. In a pinch, it will cling to opponents and pierce them with the blades all over its body.

name: Bisharp

attacks.name: Double-Edged Slash
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

flavorText: This Pokémon commands a group of several Pawniard. Groups that are defeated in territorial disputes are absorbed by the winning side.

name: Mabosstiff

abilities.name: Intimidating Howl
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may switch out your opponent's Active Pokémon to the Bench. (Your opponent chooses the new Active Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Wild Tackle
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

flavorText: Mabosstiff loves playing with children. Though usually gentle, it takes on an intimidating look when protecting its family.

name: Shroodle

attacks.name: Berry Search
attacks.text: Put a Basic Energy card from your discard pile into your hand.

flavorText: Though usually a mellow Pokémon, it will sink its sharp, poison-soaked front teeth into any that anger it, causing paralysis in the object of its ire.

name: Grafaiai

attacks.name: Spit Poison
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Colorful Graffiti
attacks.text: You may discard as many Basic Energy cards as you like from your hand. This attack does 40 damage for each type of Basic Energy you discarded in this way.

flavorText: The color of the poisonous saliva depends on what the Pokémon eats. Grafaiai covers its fingers in its saliva and draws patterns on trees in forests.

name: Flittle

attacks.name: Psy Bolt
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: Flittle's toes levitate about half an inch above the ground because of the psychic power emitted from the frills on the Pokémon's belly.

name: Tinkaton

abilities.name: Gather Materials
abilities.text: You must discard a card from your hand in order to use this Ability. Once during your turn, you may draw 3 cards.

attacks.name: Special Hammer
attacks.text: If this Pokémon has any Special Energy attached, this attack does 90 more damage.

flavorText: This intelligent Pokémon has a very daring disposition. It knocks rocks into the sky with its hammer, aiming for flying Corviknight.

name: Weavile

abilities.name: Assaulting Hunt
abilities.text: Once during your turn, when this Pokémon moves from your Bench to the Active Spot, you may switch in 1 of your opponent's Benched Basic Pokémon to the Active Spot.

flavorText: Evolution made it even more devious. It communicates by clawing signs in boulders.

name: Scizor

attacks.name: Punishing Scissors
attacks.text: This attack does 50 more damage for each of your opponent's Pokémon in play that has an Ability.

flavorText: This Pokémon's pincers, which contain steel, can crush any hard object they get ahold of into bits.

name: Mime Jr.

attacks.name: Mimed Games
attacks.text: Your opponent chooses an attack from 1 of their Pokémon in play. Use the chosen attack as this attack.

flavorText: In an attempt to confuse its enemy, it mimics the enemy's movements. Then it wastes no time in making itself scarce!

name: Mimikyu

abilities.name: Safeguard
abilities.text: Prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from your opponent's Pokémon ex and Pokémon V.

attacks.name: Ghost Eye
attacks.text: Put 7 damage counters on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: This Pokémon lives in dark places untouched by sunlight. When it appears before humans, it hides itself under a cloth that resembles a Pikachu.

name: Dachsbun

abilities.name: Well-Baked Body
abilities.text: This Pokémon can't be Burned. Prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from your opponent's Fire Pokémon.

flavorText: The pleasant aroma that emanates from this Pokémon's body helps wheat grow, so Dachsbun has been treasured by farming villages.

name: Ceruledge

attacks.name: Life Sucker
attacks.text: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Fighting Sword
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon ex or Pokémon V, this attack does 100 more damage.

flavorText: The fiery blades on its arms burn fiercely with the lingering resentment of a sword wielder who fell before accomplishing their goal.

name: Houndstone

attacks.name: Last Respects
attacks.text: This attack does 10 more damage for each Psychic Pokémon in your discard pile.

flavorText: A lovingly mourned Pokémon was reborn as Houndstone. It doesn't like anyone touching the protuberance atop its head.

name: Primeape

attacks.name: Raging Punch
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 20 damage to itself.

flavorText: Some researchers theorize that Primeape remains angry even when inside a Poké Ball.

name: Hawlucha

abilities.name: Flying Entry
abilities.text: When you play this Pokémon from your hand onto your Bench during your turn, you may choose 2 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon and put 1 damage counter on each of them.

flavorText: Its elegant finishing moves—performed by nimbly leaping around using its wings—are polished in the forest where it was born and raised.

name: Naclstack

attacks.name: Salt Cannon
attacks.text: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 60 damage for each heads.

flavorText: This Pokémon dry cures its prey by spraying salt over them. The curing process steals away the water in the prey's body.

name: Murkrow

attacks.name: Spin Turn
attacks.text: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: United Wings
attacks.text: This attack does 20 damage for each Pokémon in your discard pile that has the United Wings attack.

flavorText: Feared and loathed by many, it is believed to bring misfortune to all those who see it at night.

name: Sneasel
flavorText: This cunning Pokémon hides under the cover of darkness, waiting to attack its prey.

name: Sableye

attacks.name: Night Eyes
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Unseen Claw
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is affected by a Special Condition, this attack does 70 more damage.

flavorText: It dwells in the darkness of caves. It uses its sharp claws to dig up gems to nourish itself.

name: Kadabra

attacks.name: Teleportation Attack
attacks.text: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: This Pokémon's telekinesis is immensely powerful. To prepare for evolution, Kadabra stores up psychic energy in the star on its forehead.

name: Cleffa

attacks.name: Grasping Draw
attacks.text: Draw cards until you have 7 cards in your hand.

flavorText: Because of its unusual, starlike silhouette, people believe that it came here on a meteor.

name: Klefki

abilities.name: Mischievous Lock
abilities.text: As long as this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, Basic Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) have no Abilities, except for Mischievous Lock.

attacks.name: Joust
attacks.text: Before doing damage, discard all Pokémon Tools from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: In the past, noble families entrusted their vault keys to a Klefki. They passed the Klefki down through the generations, taking good care of it.

name: Rabsca

attacks.name: Revival Blessing
attacks.text: Put a Pokémon from your discard pile onto your Bench.

attacks.name: Psybeam
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: The body that supports the ball barely moves. Therefore, it is thought that the true body of this Pokémon is actually inside the ball.

name: Tinkatuff

attacks.name: Play Rough
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

attacks.name: Pulverizing Press
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: This Pokémon will attack groups of Pawniard and Bisharp, gathering metal from them in order to create a large and sturdy hammer.

name: Mankey

attacks.name: Monkey Beatdown
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: It is extremely quick to anger. It could be docile one moment, then thrashing away the next instant.

name: Paldean Tauros

attacks.name: Raging Horns
attacks.text: This attack does 10 more damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Combat Tackle
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

flavorText: This kind of Tauros, known as the Combat Breed, is distinguished by its thick, powerful muscles and its fierce disposition.

name: Riolu

attacks.name: Reckless Charge
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 20 damage to itself.

flavorText: They communicate with one another using their auras. They are able to run all through the night.

name: Lucario

attacks.name: Avenging Knuckle
attacks.text: If any of your Fighting Pokémon were Knocked Out by damage from an attack during your opponent's last turn, this attack does 120 more damage.

attacks.name: Accelerating Stab
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Accelerating Stab.

flavorText: It's said that no foe can remain invisible to Lucario, since it can detect auras—even those of foes it could not otherwise see.

name: Glimmet

attacks.name: Ascension
attacks.text: Search your deck for a card that evolves from this Pokémon and put it onto this Pokémon to evolve it. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: It absorbs nutrients from cave walls. The petals it wears are made of crystallized poison.

name: Kingambit

abilities.name: Leadership
abilities.text: Your Basic Pokémon's attacks do 30 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

flavorText: Only a Bisharp that stands above all others in its vast army can evolve into Kingambit.

name: Varoom

attacks.name: Rev
attacks.text: Put up to 2 Basic Energy cards from your discard pile into your hand.

flavorText: It is said that this Pokémon was born when an unknown poison Pokémon entered and inspirited an engine left at a scrap-processing factory.

name: Revavroom

abilities.name: Rumbling Engine
abilities.text: You must discard an Energy card from your hand in order to use this Ability. Once during your turn, you may draw cards until you have 6 cards in your hand.

attacks.name: Knock Away
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 90 more damage.

flavorText: It creates a gas out of poison and minerals from rocks. It then detonates the gas in its cylinders— now numbering eight—to generate energy.

name: Pidgey

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.text: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Pokémon and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: It is docile and prefers to avoid conflict. If disturbed, however, it can ferociously strike back.

name: Jigglypuff

attacks.name: Lead
attacks.text: Search your deck for a Supporter card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Stompy Stomp
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.

flavorText: When its huge eyes waver, it sings a mysteriously soothing melody that lulls its enemies to sleep.

name: Doduo

attacks.name: Reckless Charge
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: The brains in its two heads appear to communicate emotions to each other with a telepathic power.

name: Noibat
flavorText: This Pokémon emits ultrasonic waves from its large ears to search for fruit to eat. It mistakes Applin for its food.

name: Cyclizar

attacks.name: Acceleration Drive
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from and effects of attacks done to this Pokémon.

flavorText: Apparently Cyclizar has been allowing people to ride on its back since ancient times. Depictions of this have been found in 10,000-year-old murals.

name: Pidgeotto
flavorText: Very protective of its sprawling territorial area, this Pokémon will fiercely peck at any intruder.

name: Dodrio

abilities.name: Zooming Draw
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may put 1 damage counter on this Pokémon. If you do, draw a card.

attacks.name: Ballistic Beak
attacks.text: This attack does 30 more damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.

flavorText: An odd species that is rarely found. The three heads respectively represent joy, sadness, and anger.

name: Ditto

abilities.name: Transformative Start
abilities.text: Once during your first turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you may search your deck and choose a Basic Pokémon you find there, except any Ditto. If you do, discard this Pokémon and all attached cards, and put the chosen Pokémon in its place. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: Its transformation ability is perfect. However, if made to laugh, it can't maintain its disguise.

name: Snorlax

abilities.name: Voraciousness
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may put up to 2 Leftovers cards from your discard pile into your hand.

attacks.name: Thudding Press
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

flavorText: This Pokémon's stomach is so strong, even eating moldy or rotten food will not affect it.

name: Wingull
flavorText: It soars high in the sky, riding on updrafts like a glider. It carries food tucked in its bill.

name: Pelipper

abilities.name: Hearsay
abilities.text: When you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon during your turn, you may choose 1: put a Supporter card from your discard pile into your hand; or search your deck for a Supporter card, reveal it, put it into your hand, and then shuffle your deck.

flavorText: It is a flying transporter that carries small Pokémon in its beak. It bobs on the waves to rest its wings.

name: Maushold

attacks.name: Family Attack
attacks.text: This attack does 70 damage for each of your Maushold in play.

flavorText: The larger pair protects the little ones during battles. When facing strong opponents, the whole group will join the fight.

name: Oinkologne

attacks.name: Finest Selection
attacks.text: Flip 3 coins. Put a number of cards up to the number of heads from your discard pile into your hand.

attacks.name: Perfume Press
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: This Pokémon sends a flowerlike scent wafting about. Well-developed muscles in its legs allow it to leap more than 16 feet with no trouble at all.

name: Tandemaus

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.text: Draw 2 cards.

flavorText: Exhibiting great teamwork, they use their incisors to cut pieces out of any material that might be useful for a nest, then make off with them.

name: Toedscruel ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Protective Mycelium
abilities.text: Prevent all effects of attacks used by your opponent's Pokémon done to all of your Pokémon that have Energy attached. (Existing effects are not removed. Damage is not an effect.)

attacks.name: Colony Rush
attacks.text: This attack does 40 more damage for each of your Benched Pokémon that has any Grass Energy attached.

name: Palafin

attacks.name: Jet Punch
attacks.text: This attack also does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Justice Kick
attacks.text: If this Pokémon didn't move from the Bench to the Active Spot this turn, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: This Pokémon's ancient genes have awakened. It is now so extraordinarily strong that it can easily lift a cruise ship with one fin.

name: Mew ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Restart
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may draw cards until you have 3 cards in your hand.

attacks.name: Genome Hacking
attacks.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's Active Pokémon's attacks and use it as this attack.

name: Nemona
rules: Draw 3 cards.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

name: Forretress ex
rules: Tera: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks (both yours and your opponent's).
Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Exploding Energy
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may search your deck for up to 5 Basic Grass Energy cards and attach them to your Pokémon in any way you like. Then, shuffle your deck. If you searched your deck in this way, this Pokémon is Knocked Out.

attacks.name: Guard Press
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 30 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

name: Espathra ex
rules: Tera: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks (both yours and your opponent's).
Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Dazzling Gaze
abilities.text: As long as this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, attacks used by your opponent's Active Pokémon cost Colorless more.

attacks.name: Psy Ball
attacks.text: This attack does 30 more damage for each Energy attached to both Active Pokémon.

name: Pawmi
flavorText: The pads of its paws are electricity-discharging organs. Pawmi fires electricity from its forepaws while standing unsteadily on its hind legs.

name: Clive
rules: Your opponent reveals their hand, and you draw 2 cards for each Supporter card you find there.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

name: Judge
rules: Each player shuffles their hand into their deck and draws 4 cards.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

name: Paldean Student
rules: Search your deck for a Pokémon that doesn't have a Rule Box, reveal it, and put it into your hand. For each Paldean Student card (not including this card) in your discard pile, you may search for an additional Pokémon in this way. Then, shuffle your deck. (Pokémon ex, Pokémon V, etc. have Rule Boxes.)
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

name: Paldean Student
rules: Search your deck for a Pokémon that doesn't have a Rule Box, reveal it, and put it into your hand. For each Paldean Student card (not including this card) in your discard pile, you may search for an additional Pokémon in this way. Then, shuffle your deck. (Pokémon ex, Pokémon V, etc. have Rule Boxes.)
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

name: Arven
rules: Search your deck for an Item card and a Pokémon Tool card, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

name: Miraidon ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Tandem Unit
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may search your deck for up to 2 Basic Lightning Pokémon and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Photon Blaster
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

name: Flamigo

abilities.name: Insta-Flock
abilities.text: When you play this Pokémon from your hand onto your Bench during your turn, you may search your deck for up to 3 Flamigo, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: United Wings
attacks.text: This attack does 20 damage for each Pokémon in your discard pile that has the United Wings attack.

flavorText: This Pokémon apparently ties the base of its neck into a knot so that energy stored in its belly does not escape from its beak.

name: Alakazam ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Mind Jack
attacks.text: This attack does 30 more damage for each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Dimensional Hand
attacks.text: This attack can be used even if this Pokémon is on the Bench.

name: Mew ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Restart
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may draw cards until you have 3 cards in your hand.

attacks.name: Genome Hacking
attacks.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's Active Pokémon's attacks and use it as this attack.

name: Gardevoir ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Psychic Embrace
abilities.text: As often as you like during your turn, you may attach a Basic Psychic Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Psychic Pokémon. If you attached Energy to a Pokémon in this way, put 2 damage counters on that Pokémon. You can't use this Ability on a Pokémon that would be Knocked Out.

attacks.name: Miracle Force
attacks.text: This Pokémon recovers from all Special Conditions.

name: Glimmora ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Dust Field
abilities.text: As long as this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, your opponent can't have more than 3 Benched Pokémon. If they have 4 or more Benched Pokémon, they discard Benched Pokémon until they have 3 Pokémon on the Bench. If more than one effect changes the number of Benched Pokémon allowed, use the smaller number.

attacks.name: Poisonous Gem
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

name: Paldean Clodsire ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Toxic Wetland
abilities.text: Once during your turn, if a Stadium is in play, you may make your opponent's Active Pokémon Poisoned.

attacks.name: Needle Bone
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, during your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

name: Noivern ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Covert Flight
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from Basic Pokémon.

attacks.name: Dominating Echo
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, they can't play any Special Energy or Stadium cards from their hand.

name: Wugtrio

attacks.name: Undersea Tunnel
attacks.text: Flip 3 coins. For each heads, discard the top 3 cards of your opponent's deck.

flavorText: It has a vicious temperament, contrary to what its appearance may suggest. It wraps its long bodies around prey, then drags the prey into its den.

name: Gardevoir ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Psychic Embrace
abilities.text: As often as you like during your turn, you may attach a Basic Psychic Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Psychic Pokémon. If you attached Energy to a Pokémon in this way, put 2 damage counters on that Pokémon. You can't use this Ability on a Pokémon that would be Knocked Out.

attacks.name: Miracle Force
attacks.text: This Pokémon recovers from all Special Conditions.

name: Clive
rules: Your opponent reveals their hand, and you draw 2 cards for each Supporter card you find there.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

name: Chien-Pao ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Shivery Chill
abilities.text: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you may search your deck for up to 2 Basic Water Energy cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Hail Blade
attacks.text: You may discard any amount of Water Energy from your Pokémon. This attack does 60 damage for each card you discarded in this way.

name: Ting-Lu ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Cursed Land
abilities.text: As long as this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, your opponent's Pokémon in play that have any damage counters on them have no Abilities, except for Pokémon ex.

attacks.name: Land Scoop
attacks.text: Put 2 damage counters on 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

name: Skwovet

abilities.name: Nest Stash
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may shuffle your hand and put it on the bottom of your deck. If you put any cards on the bottom of your deck in this way, draw a card.

flavorText: No matter how much it stuffs its belly with food, it is always anxious about getting hungry again. So, it stashes berries in its cheeks and tail.

name: Greedent

attacks.name: Enhanced Fang
attacks.text: If this Pokémon has a Pokémon Tool attached, this attack does 80 more damage.

flavorText: This Pokémon makes off with heaps of fallen berries by wrapping them in its tail, which is roughly twice the length of its body.

name: Lechonk

attacks.name: Whimsy Tackle
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: It searches for food all day. It possesses a keen sense of smell but doesn't use it for anything other than foraging.

name: Pidgeot ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Quick Search
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may search your deck for a card and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck. You can't use more than 1 Quick Search Ability each turn.

attacks.name: Blustery Wind
attacks.text: You may discard a Stadium in play.

name: Wigglytuff ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Expanding Body
abilities.text: If this Pokémon has any Special Energy attached, it gets +100 HP.

attacks.name: Friend Tackle
attacks.text: If you played a Supporter card from your hand during this turn, this attack does 90 more damage.

name: Squawkabilly ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Squawk and Seize
abilities.text: Once during your first turn, you may discard your hand and draw 6 cards. You can't use more than 1 Squawk and Seize Ability during your turn.

attacks.name: Motivate
attacks.text: Attach up to 2 Basic Energy cards from your discard pile to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

name: Nemona
rules: Draw 3 cards.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

name: Charizard ex
rules: Tera: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks (both yours and your opponent's).
Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Infernal Reign
abilities.text: When you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon during your turn, you may search your deck for up to 3 Basic Fire Energy cards and attach them to your Pokémon in any way you like. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Burning Darkness
attacks.text: This attack does 30 more damage for each Prize card your opponent has taken.

name: Iono
rules: Each player shuffles their hand and puts it on the bottom of their deck. If either player put any cards on the bottom of their deck in this way, each player draws a card for each of their remaining Prize cards.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

name: Penny
rules: Put 1 of your Basic Pokémon and all attached cards into your hand.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

name: Wo-Chien ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Covetous Ivy
attacks.text: This attack does 60 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon for each Prize card your opponent has taken. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Chi-Yu ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Jealously Singe
attacks.text: Discard the top 2 cards of your opponent's deck.

attacks.name: Flame Surge
attacks.text: Choose up to 3 of your Benched Pokémon. For each of those Pokémon, search your deck for a Basic Fire Energy card and attach it to that Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.

name: Koraidon ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Dino Cry
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may attach up to 2 Basic Fighting Energy cards from your discard pile to your Basic Fighting Pokémon in any way you like. If you use this Ability, your turn ends.

attacks.name: Wild Impact
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

name: Chi-Yu

attacks.name: Flare Bringer
attacks.text: Attach up to 2 Basic Fire Energy cards from your discard pile to 1 of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Megafire of Envy
attacks.text: If any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out by damage from an attack during your opponent's last turn, this attack does 90 more damage.

flavorText: It controls flames burning at over 5,400 degrees Fahrenheit. It casually swims through the sea of lava it creates by melting rock and sand.

name: Pineco
flavorText: It likes to make its shell thicker by adding layers of tree bark. The additional weight doesn't bother it.

name: Xatu

abilities.name: Clairvoyant Sense
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may attach a Basic Psychic Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Benched Pokémon. If you attached Energy to a Pokémon in this way, draw 2 cards.

flavorText: This odd Pokémon can see both the past and the future. It eyes the sun's movement all day.

name: Sinistea

attacks.name: Cold Tea
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: The soul of someone who died alone possessed some leftover tea. This Pokémon appears in hotels and houses.

name: Charizard ex
rules: Tera: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks (both yours and your opponent's).
Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Infernal Reign
abilities.text: When you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon during your turn, you may search your deck for up to 3 Basic Fire Energy cards and attach them to your Pokémon in any way you like. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Burning Darkness
attacks.text: This attack does 30 more damage for each Prize card your opponent has taken.

name: Iron Bundle

abilities.name: Hyper Blower
abilities.text: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is on your Bench, you may switch out your opponent's Active Pokémon to the Bench. (Your opponent chooses the new Active Pokémon.) If you do, discard this Pokémon and all attached cards.

attacks.name: Refrigerated Stream
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon is an Evolution Pokémon, it can't attack during your opponent's next turn.

flavorText: It resembles a mysterious object mentioned in an old book. There are only two reported sightings of this Pokémon.

name: Aegislash

abilities.name: Mysterious Shield
abilities.text: Prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from your opponent's Pokémon ex and Pokémon V.

attacks.name: Hard Bashing
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: Its potent spectral powers allow it to manipulate others. It once used its powers to force people and Pokémon to build a kingdom to its liking.

name: Cetitan

attacks.name: Avalanche
attacks.text: This attack also does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Rolling Slider
attacks.text: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 100 damage for each heads.

flavorText: This Pokémon wanders around snowy, icy areas. It protects its body with powerful muscles and a thick layer of fat under its skin.

attacks.name: Graveyard Gamboling
attacks.text: This attack does 10 damage for each Psychic Pokémon in your discard pile.

name: Scream Tail

attacks.name: Roaring Scream
attacks.text: This attack does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon for each damage counter on this Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: There has been only one reported sighting of this Pokémon. It resembles a mysterious creature depicted in an old expedition journal.

abilities.name: Safeguard
abilities.text: Prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from your opponent's Pokémon ex and Pokémon V.

attacks.name: Ghost Eye
attacks.text: Put 7 damage counters on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

name: Roaring Moon ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Frenzied Gouging
attacks.text: Knock Out your opponent's Active Pokémon. If your opponent's Active Pokémon is Knocked Out in this way, this Pokémon does 200 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Calamity Storm
attacks.text: You may discard a Stadium in play. If you do, this attack does 120 more damage.

name: Arctibax
flavorText: Arctibax freezes the air around it, protecting its face with an ice mask and turning its dorsal fin into a blade of ice.

name: Iron Valiant ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Tachyon Bits
abilities.text: Once during your turn, when this Pokémon moves from your Bench to the Active Spot, you may put 2 damage counters on 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

attacks.name: Laser Blade
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

name: Iron Bundle

abilities.name: Hyper Blower
abilities.text: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is on your Bench, you may switch out your opponent's Active Pokémon to the Bench. (Your opponent chooses the new Active Pokémon.) If you do, discard this Pokémon and all attached cards.

attacks.name: Refrigerated Stream
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon is an Evolution Pokémon, it can't attack during your opponent's next turn.

flavorText: It resembles a mysterious object mentioned in an old book. There are only two reported sightings of this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Ambush
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

name: Pikachu with Grey Felt Hat

attacks.name: Pika-Portrait
attacks.text: Search your deck for a Pikachu and put it onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: When it is angered, it immediately discharges the energy stored in the pouches of its cheeks.

name: Oddish

attacks.name: Grass Knot
attacks.text: This attack does 20 damage for each Colorless in your opponent's Active Pokémon's Retreat Cost.

flavorText: During the day, it stays in the cold underground to avoid the sun. It grows by bathing in moonlight.

name: Scyther

attacks.name: Slashing Strike
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Slashing Strike.

flavorText: The sharp scythes on its forearms become increasingly sharp by cutting through hard objects.

name: Pineco
flavorText: It spits out a fluid that it uses to glue tree bark to its body. The fluid hardens when it touches air.

name: Seedot

attacks.name: Rigidify
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 30 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

flavorText: If it remains still, it looks just like a real nut. It delights in surprising foraging Pokémon.

name: Nuzleaf

attacks.name: Comet Slap
attacks.text: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 30 damage for each heads.

flavorText: It lives deep in forests. With the leaf on its head, it makes a flute whose song makes listeners uneasy.

name: Shiftry

attacks.name: Expelling Tornado
attacks.text: Choose 3 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. If you do, shuffle all of your opponent's Benched Pokémon that you didn't choose, and all cards attached to those Pokémon, into their deck.

attacks.name: Energy Loop
attacks.text: Put an Energy attached to this Pokémon into your hand.

flavorText: A Pokémon that was feared as a forest guardian. It can read the foe's mind and take preemptive action.

name: Shroomish

attacks.name: Double Headbutt
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 10 damage for each heads.

flavorText: If it senses danger, it scatters spores from the top of its head to protect itself.

name: Breloom

attacks.name: Knuckle Impact
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

flavorText: The seeds on its tail are made of toxic spores. It knocks out foes with quick, virtually invisible punches.

name: Roselia

abilities.name: Poison Point
abilities.text: If this Pokémon is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokémon (even if this Pokémon is Knocked Out), the Attacking Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavorText: Its flowers give off a relaxing fragrance. The stronger its aroma, the healthier the Roselia is.

name: Roserade

abilities.name: Poison Point
abilities.text: If this Pokémon is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokémon (even if this Pokémon is Knocked Out), the Attacking Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Bind Down
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

flavorText: After captivating opponents with its sweet scent, it lashes them with its thorny whips.

name: Turtwig

abilities.name: Solid Shell
abilities.text: This Pokémon takes 20 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

flavorText: Photosynthesis occurs across its body under the sun. The shell on its back is actually hardened soil.

name: Grotle

attacks.name: Ramming Shell
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 20 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

flavorText: It lives along water in forests. In the daytime, it leaves the forest to sunbathe its treed shell.

name: Torterra ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Forest March
attacks.text: This attack does 30 damage for each of your Grass Pokémon in play.

attacks.name: Jungle Hammer
attacks.text: Heal 50 damage from this Pokémon.

name: Shaymin

attacks.name: Pinpoint Dive
attacks.text: This attack does 60 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon ex or Benched Pokémon V. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: It can dissolve toxins in the air to instantly transform ruined land into a lush field of flowers.

name: Whimsicott

abilities.name: Wafting Heal
abilities.text: When you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon during your turn, you may heal all damage from your Active Grass Pokémon. If you healed any damage in this way, discard all Energy from that Pokémon.

flavorText: It scatters cotton all over the place as a prank. If it gets wet, it'll become too heavy to move and have no choice but to answer for its mischief.

name: Cottonee

attacks.name: Triple Spin
attacks.text: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage for each heads.

flavorText: It shoots cotton from its body to protect itself. If it gets caught up in hurricane-strength winds, it can get sent to the other side of the Earth.

name: Deerling

attacks.name: Leaf Litter Tackle
attacks.text: Discard a Grass Energy from this Pokémon.

flavorText: Deerling have different scents depending on the season. In this form, Deerling have a softly sweet scent that lingers in the nose.

name: Sawsbuck

abilities.name: Changing Seasons
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may search your deck for a Stadium card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: Sawsbuck in their Autumn Form are known for having very short tempers. The males fight each other incessantly.

name: Grubbin

attacks.name: Flock
attacks.text: Search your deck for up to 2 Grubbin and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: Its natural enemies, like Rookidee, may flee rather than risk getting caught in its large mandibles that can snap thick tree branches.

name: Bramblin
flavorText: Not even Bramblin knows where it is headed as it tumbles across the wilderness, blown by the wind. It loathes getting wet.

name: Brambleghast

abilities.name: Resilient Soul
abilities.text: This Pokémon gets +50 HP for each Prize card your opponent has taken.

attacks.name: Powerful Needles
attacks.text: Flip a coin for each Energy attached to this Pokémon. This attack does 80 damage for each heads.

flavorText: Brambleghast wanders around arid regions. On rare occasions, mass outbreaks of these Pokémon will bury an entire town.

name: Rabsca

abilities.name: Spherical Shield
abilities.text: Prevent all damage from and effects of attacks from your opponent's Pokémon done to your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Psychic
attacks.text: This attack does 30 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: An infant sleeps inside the ball. Rabsca rolls the ball soothingly with its legs to ensure the infant sleeps comfortably.

name: Dhelmise

attacks.name: Steel Anchor
attacks.text: If you have any Metal Pokémon on your Bench, this attack does 80 more damage.

flavorText: After a piece of seaweed merged with debris from a sunken ship, it was reborn as this ghost Pokémon.

name: Rellor

attacks.name: Slight Intrusion
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: It rolls its mud ball around while the energy it needs for evolution matures. Eventually the time comes for it to evolve.

name: Scovillain ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Chili Snapper Bind
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned. During your opponent's next turn, that Pokémon can't retreat.

attacks.name: Two-Headed Crushing
attacks.text: Discard a random card from your opponent's hand. Discard the top card of your opponent's deck.

name: Iron Leaves ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Rapid Vernier
abilities.text: When you play this Pokémon from your hand onto your Bench during your turn, you may switch it with your Active Pokémon. If you do, you may move any amount of Energy from your other Pokémon to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Prism Edge
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

name: Ponyta

attacks.name: Charge Energy
attacks.text: Search your deck for a Basic Energy card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: It can't run properly when it's newly born. As it races around with others of its kind, its legs grow stronger.

name: Rapidash

attacks.name: Inferno Onrush
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

flavorText: This Pokémon can be seen galloping through fields at speeds of up to 150 mph, its fiery mane fluttering in the wind.

name: Slugma

attacks.name: Roasting Heat
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is Burned, this attack does 40 more damage.

flavorText: A common sight in volcanic areas, it slowly slithers around in a constant search for warm places.

name: Magcargo

abilities.name: Lava Zone
abilities.text: Whenever your opponent's Active Pokémon moves to the Bench during their turn, their new Active Pokémon is now Burned.

flavorText: Its brittle shell occasionally spouts intense flames that circulate throughout its body.

name: Victini

attacks.name: Flippity Flap
attacks.text: Shuffle your hand into your deck. Then, draw 6 cards.

attacks.name: Singe Off
attacks.text: Discard a Special Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: This Pokémon brings victory. It is said that Trainers with Victini always win, regardless of the type of encounter.

name: Heatmor

attacks.name: Licking Flames
attacks.text: Flip 3 coins. For each tails, discard an Energy from this Pokémon.

flavorText: There's a hole in its tail that allows it to draw in the air it needs to keep its fire burning. If the hole gets blocked, this Pokémon will fall ill.

name: Litten

attacks.name: Fake Out
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: It spends even the smallest amount of downtime grooming its fur with its tongue. Loose fur gathers in its stomach and serves as fuel for fiery moves.

name: Torracat

attacks.name: Flare Strike
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Flare Strike.

flavorText: In the midst of battle, the fire pouch on Torracat's neck rings like a bell and produces stronger flames than usual.

name: Incineroar ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Hustle Play
abilities.text: Attacks used by this Pokémon cost Colorless less for each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Blaze Blast
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

name: Turtonator

attacks.name: Spit-Out Shot
attacks.text: This attack does 40 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: Explosive substances coat the shell on its back. Enemies that dare attack it will be blown away by an immense detonation.

name: Sizzlipede

attacks.name: Heat Dive
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: It stores flammable gas in its body and uses it to generate heat. The yellow sections on its belly get particularly hot.

name: Centiskorch

attacks.name: Singe
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Charring Breath
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon isn't Burned, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: When it heats up, its body temperature reaches about 1,500 degrees Fahrenheit. It lashes its body like a whip and launches itself at enemies.

name: Gouging Fire ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Blaze Blitz
attacks.text: This Pokémon can't use Blaze Blitz again until it leaves the Active Spot.

name: Totodile

attacks.name: Big Bite
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

flavorText: It is small but rough and tough. It won't hesitate to take a bite out of anything that moves.

name: Croconaw

attacks.name: Reverse Thrust
attacks.text: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.
